items.title: Page Intelligence — Optimization Score History & Trending
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-14 in Output Quality Follow-Ups PR. Added append-only `page_keyword_score_history` snapshots, attached score history to `PageKeywordMap`, recorded snapshots on single/batch analysis writes only when the score changes, and surfaced compact Page Intelligence score deltas in the page list. Broader month-level reporting can build on the same table later.

items.title: AI Research Mode — Anti-Hallucination Prompt Blocks
items.source: USER REQUEST (Reddit find: Anthropic docs anti-hallucination techniques)
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18 in SEO Intelligence backend closeout. Expanded `RESEARCH_MODE_INSTRUCTIONS` in `server/ai.ts` to require explicit observed-vs-inferred framing, forbid presenting inferred/example values as verified facts, and require explicit source-availability disclosure when citations are requested but missing. Admin chat (`/api/admin-chat`) now always calls `callAI` with `researchMode: true`. Added regression guard in `tests/contract/factual-ai-output-contracts.test.ts` to prevent drift.

items.title: Content Review Evidence Panel — Show SERP provenance for factual claims
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-14 in Output Quality Follow-Ups PR. Post review now loads the source brief and displays stored `realPeopleAlsoAsk` and `realTopResults` in the existing review checklist as reviewer support. AI review still marks factual accuracy/no hallucinations as human-review-only and never auto-checks provenance-sensitive items.

items.title: Internal Link Recommendation Source Audit
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18 in SEO Intelligence backend closeout. Added formal audit deliverable at `docs/superpowers/audits/2026-05-18-internal-link-recommendation-source-audit.md` inventorying producer/consumer contracts across scanner, SEO copy, briefs, and client actions. Audit confirms scanner contract (`fromPage/fromTitle/toPage/toTitle/anchorText/reason/priority`) as canonical actionable source and documents drift queue for `#632` (source-title preservation + URL/title field semantics cleanup).

items.title: Audit Snapshot Effective Summary Query Optimization
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18 in SEO Intelligence backend closeout. Added `listSnapshotsDetailed(siteId)` in `server/reports.ts` and refactored suppression paths in `server/audit-snapshot-views.ts` to compute current + previous effective scores from one ordered in-memory snapshot list, eliminating per-summary `getSnapshot()` and repeated previous-snapshot lookups. Added unit coverage in `tests/unit/audit-snapshot-views.test.ts` for suppression-adjusted history semantics.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 6 — Deferred Platform Polish
sprints.rationale: Park useful but less urgent platform-health work behind the first five waves so it stays visible without competing with higher-confidence unlocks.

items.title: Frontend Container Decomposition Pass
items.notes:
Shipped 2026-05-15 in three sequential staging-first PRs: (1) HealthTab decomposition (`useHealthTabShell` + section components + extraction contract), (2) InboxTab decomposition (`useInboxTabShell`, extracted inbox filter contract module, new/legacy layout wrappers, and extraction contract), (3) ClientDashboard shell decomposition (`useClientWorkspaceBootstrap`, extracted nav derivation helpers, tab-composition shell, and updated deep-link contract parser for panel-map routing). All work was behavior-preserving (no API/shared-type/route/feature-flag semantic changes), independently reviewed, and merged after green CI on each PR.
Wave follow-up 2026-05-16: centralized repeated HealthTab pure logic into `healthTabModel.ts` (issue-impact mapping, filtered-page derivation, category stats, info counts, fix-type grouping) and wired `useHealthTabShell`/`HealthTabSections` to consume the shared helpers, with new extraction/model guardrail tests.

items.title: API Wrapper Domain Cleanup
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-16: completed an incremental, backward-compatible API-wrapper domain split. Added `src/api/platform.ts` (jobs/roadmap/features/notifications/workspace-home/observability surfaces) and `src/api/schema.ts` (schema/schema-validation/schema-plan/schema-impact surfaces), then converted `src/api/misc.ts` and `src/api/seo.ts` into compatibility re-export facades for those moved wrappers. Updated adjacent consumers to import from new domain modules (`useWorkspaceHome`, `useIntegrationHealth`, `useNotifications`, `FeatureLibrary`, `Roadmap`, `BulkAcceptPanel`, `useSchemaValidation`, `SchemaPlanPanel`, `SchemaImpactPanel`, `useSchemaSuggesterPublishingWorkflow`). Added contract guardrails (`tests/contract/api-wrapper-domain-cleanup.test.ts`) plus compatibility test updates to lock ownership boundaries while preserving legacy import paths.

items.title: Architecture Drift Checks
items.notes:
Shipped 2026-05-15: implemented styleguide drift architecture guardrails with a canonical lockdown contract (`docs/rules/styleguide-lockdown-contract.md`), new pr-check enforcement rules (style exception metadata contract, raw `<button>` drift detector, raw CTA literal detector), warning→error ratchet promotions for zero-backlog style rules, and a machine-readable style drift report/baseline regression gate (`scripts/report-style-drift.ts`, `verify:style-drift`, `report:style-drift`).
Wave follow-up 2026-05-15: completed a parallel admin action-button primitive sweep across SEO Editor action rows (`SeoEditorHeaderActions`, `ApprovalPanel`, `SeoEditorTableControls`, `BulkOperations`), SettingsPanel top-level controls, WorkspaceHome action links/status cards, and SchemaSuggester top controls. Style drift metrics improved from `raw_button_unallowlisted_count: 891 -> 855` and `non_primitive_action_count: 876 -> 840`; admin raw-button count now `717` (down from `753`).
Wave 3b follow-up 2026-05-15: migrated admin settings/audit controls in `ConnectionsTab`, `FeaturesTab`, `ClientDashboardTab`, and SEO Audit share actions to `Button`/`IconButton`. Style drift metrics improved further to `raw_button_unallowlisted_count: 808` and `non_primitive_action_count: 793`; admin raw-button count now `670`.
Wave 4 follow-up 2026-05-17: established canonical styleguide parity rule registry artifacts (`docs/rules/styleguide-rule-registry.md`, `data/styleguide-rule-registry.json`) with rule-level enforcement tiers (`error|warn|manual`), ownership, metric keys, and promotion prerequisites to guide future ratchet waves from advisory to blocking checks.
Wave 5 follow-up 2026-05-17: added three non-blocking parity detectors in `pr-check` (`styleguide-css-must-import-public-tokens`, `styleguide-typography-extra-class-drift`, `global-token-declaration-outside-canonical-token-files`) with fixture coverage in `tests/pr-check.test.ts` so token/typography drift surfaces as advisory before promotion.
Wave 8 follow-up 2026-05-18: promoted five zero-backlog parity rules to blocking errors (`hardcoded card radius outside ui primitives`, `badge-like-span-outside-primitives`, `styleguide-css-must-import-public-tokens`, `styleguide-typography-extra-class-drift`, `global-token-declaration-outside-canonical-token-files`), added warn-tier detectors (`src-index-css-no-token-declarations`, `badge-color-prop-deprecation`, `interactive-div-role-button`, `primitive-override-drift-on-form-controls`), and migrated the final four live badge-like spans to `Badge` primitives in client surfaces.
Wave 10 follow-up 2026-05-17: removed structural class overrides from shared form primitive callsites across client/admin/editor surfaces, tightened `primitive-override-drift-on-form-controls` to structural drift only, promoted that rule from warn to error with docs/registry sync, and reached zero backlog (`raw form control advisory: admin=0, client=0, total=0`).
Wave 12 follow-up 2026-05-17: added three warn-tier styleguide parity heuristics in `pr-check` (`duplicate-heading-signal`, `nested-card-density-signal`, `blue-action-semantic-drift`), added fixture coverage for trigger + hatch behavior in `tests/pr-check.test.ts`, and expanded `scripts/report-style-drift.ts` with file-level advisory breakdowns for duplicate headings, nested SectionCard density, and blue action-semantic drift so cleanup can be targeted by ownership slice without blocking CI.
Wave 13 follow-up 2026-05-17: resolved all active advisory hits for the three Wave 12 heuristics by (a) converting remaining blue-styled action controls to teal semantics in asset audit/cards and SERP evidence links, and (b) marking intentional duplicated heading patterns in feature-flagged or dynamic-title surfaces with explicit `duplicate-heading-ok` hatches. Current style drift report is zero across duplicate-heading, nested-card-density, and blue-action-semantic advisories.
Wave 15 follow-up 2026-05-17: promoted `src-index-css-no-token-declarations` from warn to error after sustained zero-hit verification and added `status-semantic-mapping-drift` as a new warn-tier detector with fixture coverage and `report-style-drift` file-level advisory breakdowns to drive centralized StatusBadge/status-registry cleanup.
Wave 16 follow-up 2026-05-17: completed the remaining status-semantic migration sweep (requests, workspace-home, batch generation, redirect manager), added a canonical `request` StatusBadge domain, drove `status_semantic_mapping_drift_count` to zero, and promoted `status-semantic-mapping-drift` from warn to error with docs/registry synchronization.
Wave 17 pre-plan audit 2026-05-17: ran parallel read-only audits across static styleguide/docs, client surfaces, admin/editor/settings/schema surfaces, and enforcement plumbing; registered newly discovered parity directives as planned warn/manual contracts in the canonical registry; and published an execution matrix in  to drive the next detector + cleanup ratchet batches.
Wave 17b follow-up 2026-05-17: added automated staging merge integrity guardrails for stacked PR flows (`scripts/report-staging-merge-integrity.ts`) with CI + nightly wiring and explicit historical exception tracking in `data/staging-merge-integrity-exceptions.json` so non-staging merges that fail to land in `staging` are surfaced immediately.
Wave 18 follow-up 2026-05-17: began typography hierarchy ratchet by promoting `muted-text-two-tier-only` from planned to active advisory, adding warn-tier detection + hatch support in `pr-check`, and extending `report-style-drift` with per-file muted-tier counts (`mutedTextTierViolationCount`) to drive targeted cleanup waves.
Wave 19 follow-up 2026-05-17: activated three additional Wave 17 planned styleguide parity directives as warn-tier advisories — `focus-visible-ring-contract`, `raw-z-index-inline-literal`, and `stat-primitive-bypass-signal` — with `pr-check` detectors, hatch support, fixture coverage in `tests/pr-check.test.ts`, and new `report-style-drift` file-level metrics to route cleanup by ownership slice.

items.title: Deterministic QA/Demo Workspaces
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-16: expanded `npm run seed:demo` into a deterministic 6-scenario workspace matrix. Added explicit scenario coverage for `empty-new`, `free-client`, `growth-active`, `premium-history`, `broken-integrations`, and `rich-cms`, with fixed IDs and deterministic fixture values. Seeder now resets seeded workspace-scope artifacts each run (`requests`, `work_orders`, `approval_batches`, `client_actions`, `content_topic_requests`, `content_briefs`, `content_posts`, `schema_site_plans`, `schema_snapshots`, `schema_publish_history`, `page_edit_states`) and then applies scenario-specific history seeds so manual QA + smoke runs start from a repeatable baseline. Added guard tests for scenario coverage and broken-integration invariants, and updated local onboarding docs with the full fixture matrix and route list.

items.title: Risky Module Health Dashboard
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-16: added `scripts/platform-risky-module-dashboard.ts` risk analyzer and `scripts/report-risky-modules.ts` CLI wrapper. The dashboard ranks modules by weighted risk signals: line count, 90/180-day git churn, internal import fan-in/fan-out, TODO/FIXME/HACK + `*-ok` hatch density, test linkage, route write handlers lacking nearby integration tests, and `pr-check` warning-hit concentration. Added package commands (`verify:risky-modules`, `report:risky-modules`), integrated the audit into `scripts/verify-platform.ts`, documented workflow in `docs/workflows/risky-module-dashboard.md`, and added unit coverage in `tests/unit/platform-risky-module-dashboard.test.ts`.

items.title: Require Bounded Context in New Feature Specs
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-16: added a required spec skeleton at `docs/workflows/feature-spec-template.md` that standardizes ownership + contract capture before implementation planning (owning bounded context, route/API surface, shared contracts, query keys/invalidation, WebSocket events/listeners, and test ownership). Wired the template into core planning workflow docs: `docs/PLAN_WRITING_GUIDE.md` now requires filling the spec skeleton before task breakdown, `docs/workflows/new-feature-checklist.md` now includes a mandatory pre-planning check, and `docs/workflows/platform-golden-paths.md` now points teams to fill the spec skeleton before selecting a feature-class template.

items.title: Feature Maturity Scorecard
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-16: added `docs/workflows/feature-maturity-scorecard.md` with an explicit 8-dimension maturity rubric (shipped, documented, tested, client-visible value, monitored, monetizable, owner assigned, intelligence/reporting integration where relevant), 0-2 scoring guidance, placement thresholds, hard-stop promotion gates, and a copy/paste worksheet for evidence links. Wired the scorecard into product-surface governance and PR workflow: `docs/rules/product-surface-rationalization.md` now requires maturity scoring for placement recommendations, and `docs/workflows/pr-readiness-checklist.md` now asks for a completed scorecard when a PR promotes/demotes major surfaces.

items.title: Product Surface Area Audit
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: added machine-readable audit artifact pipeline (`scripts/report-product-surface-audit.ts`, `npm run report:product-surface-audit`) that reads current `FEATURE_AUDIT.md` headline coverage and product-surface taxonomy from `scripts/product-surface-map.ts`, writing canonical output to `data/product-surface-audit.json`. Added human-reviewed prioritization guide `docs/workflows/product-surface-audit-wave6.md` with promote/keep/hide/deprecate buckets and explicit human-verification queue. No route removals in this pass.

items.title: Collaboration Artifact Base
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: introduced shared collaboration-artifact contract (`shared/types/collaboration-artifact.ts`) and adapter layer (`src/lib/collaboration-artifacts.ts`) that normalizes `approval_batches` and `client_actions` into one routing primitive with note-based Decisions vs Conversations semantics and shared visibility metadata. `InboxTab` now partitions pending batches/actions through the shared artifact base instead of local duplicated predicates.

items.title: URL/Tab State Helper
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: added shared `?tab=` contract helpers in `src/lib/tab-search-param.ts` (`resolveTabSearchParam`, `isValidTabSearchParam`, `clearTabSearchParam`) and migrated Inbox filter resolution, ContentPipeline, LinksPanel, and WorkspaceSettings receiver initialization/cleanup to the shared helper path. Added `tests/unit/tab-search-param.test.ts` and updated inbox shell extraction contract coverage.

items.title: Analytics Date/Metric Contract
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: added `shared/types/analytics-contract.ts` with canonical date-range and metric display semantics (including explicit already-percentage boundaries for CTR and bounce/new-user metrics). Applied contract types across analytics API wrappers, client GA4/GSC hooks, GA4 shared hook/query keys, ClientDashboard/ClientHeader date-range state, and GA4 server `CustomDateRange` typing to reduce inline shape drift.

items.title: Background Job Helper Polish
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: introduced composable background-job helpers in `src/lib/background-job-helpers.ts` for start+track, attach tracking, cancellation, and completion invalidation. Migrated SEO bulk workflow and content post generation tracking to helper-first usage while preserving TaskPanel/useBackgroundTasks architecture. Added helper unit coverage and updated background-job wiring contract tests.

items.title: Test Factory and Demo Seed Unification
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: extracted canonical demo scenario definitions into `shared/demo-workspace-scenarios.ts` and rewired `scripts/seed-demo-workspaces.ts` to consume the shared source of truth. Added fixture helpers in `tests/fixtures/demo-scenario-seed.ts` and parity validation in `tests/unit/demo-scenario-parity.test.ts` so demo seeding and test fixtures align on deterministic workspace identities/integration shape.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 5 — Product & Lifecycle Discipline
sprints.rationale: Keep the platform understandable as it grows by managing product surface area, feature flags, deprecations, performance budgets, local onboarding, ADRs, and platform-health cadence.

items.title: Product Surface Rationalization
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 product-surface governance baseline. Added typed capability map + report script (`scripts/product-surface-map.ts`) with placement/role/lifecycle/recommendation taxonomy, canonical bounded-context coverage checks, and explicit human-verification queue for non-obvious nav/deprecation decisions. Added test coverage in `tests/unit/product-surface-map.test.ts` and rule doc `docs/rules/product-surface-rationalization.md` that codifies manual approval gates. Added `npm run verify:product-surface` command and documented the capability in FEATURE_AUDIT entry 418.

items.title: Feature Flag Lifecycle Management
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 feature-flag lifecycle management baseline. Expanded `shared/types/feature-flags.ts` into a single source-of-truth catalog with typed lifecycle metadata (owner, createdAt, rolloutTarget, removalCondition, linkedRoadmapItemId, staleAuditCadence, lastReviewedAt), centralized admin grouping/labels, and shared API contract type `FeatureFlagAdminMeta`. Updated server/admin surfaces so `/api/admin/feature-flags` now returns lifecycle context for each flag and FeatureFlagSettings renders that metadata inline. Added lifecycle audit command `npm run verify:feature-flags` (`scripts/feature-flag-lifecycle.ts`) plus test coverage (`tests/unit/feature-flag-lifecycle.test.ts`) and refreshed docs (`docs/rules/feature-flag-lifecycle.md`, development/release-safety references).

items.title: Feature Flag Promotion & Sunset Pass
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 promotion/sunset pass for low-risk active flags validated on staging. Promoted and removed `client-wins-surface` and `seo-editor-unified` from `shared/types/feature-flags.ts` and lifecycle catalog metadata; removed runtime gates/fallback branches so promoted paths are now canonical (`InsightsBriefingPage` always renders `WinsSurface`; `SeoEditorWrapper` always renders unified editor). Updated contract/component tests and feature audit wording to remove stale flag references.

items.title: Deprecation Lifecycle Discipline
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 deprecation lifecycle governance baseline. Added typed registry + audit command `npm run verify:deprecations` (`scripts/deprecation-lifecycle.ts`) covering lifecycle states (`deprecated`, `hidden`, `read-only`, `migrated`, `removed`) with state-specific policy checks and required code/test evidence links. Added test coverage (`tests/unit/deprecation-lifecycle.test.ts`) and rule doc `docs/rules/deprecation-lifecycle.md` to codify operating flow and human-verification requirements for deprecated/migrated/removed surfaces.

items.title: Platform Performance Budgets
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 platform performance budget governance baseline. Added typed performance budget registry + verification command (`npm run verify:performance-budgets`) in `scripts/performance-budgets.ts` covering per-workflow AI call caps, external fetch caps, route response targets, query count budgets, expected background-job durations, cache expectations, and escalation triggers/actions. Seeded high-risk workflows across jobs and public/admin read paths with required code/test evidence references and policy validation checks (duplicate ids, numeric budget integrity, evidence path existence, background-job duration requirements). Added rule doc `docs/rules/performance-budgets.md` and unit coverage in `tests/unit/performance-budgets.test.ts`.

items.title: Local Dev & Agent Onboarding Confidence
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 local onboarding confidence baseline. Added deterministic local fake-provider mode (`LOCAL_FAKE_PROVIDERS=true`) for SEO providers plus synthetic AI responses in OpenAI/Anthropic helpers so first-hour setup works without external keys. Added one-command demo workspace seeding (`npm run seed:demo`, script: `scripts/seed-demo-workspaces.ts`) and one-command core smoke bundle (`npm run smoke:core`). Documented onboarding workflow + environment tiers in `docs/workflows/local-dev-onboarding.md`, linked from codebase overview, and added unit coverage for local mode + fake provider contracts.

items.title: Recurring Platform Health Sprint Cadence
items.notes: Shipped recurring platform-health cadence contract. Added source-of-truth registry (`data/platform-health-cadence.json`) with 4-6 sprint cadence policy, measurable dimensions, checkpoint evidence links, and Wave 5 baseline metrics. Added verifier command `npm run verify:platform-health-cadence` (`scripts/platform-health-cadence.ts`) with policy/roadmap-link checks, due-window computation, and unit coverage (`tests/unit/platform-health-cadence.test.ts`). Added workflow playbook `docs/workflows/platform-health-cadence.md` and wired cadence audit into `verify-platform`.

items.title: Architecture Decision Record Log
items.notes: Shipped lightweight ADR governance baseline. Added ADR home + six seed architecture decisions in `docs/adr/` covering background jobs, workspace-intelligence slices, feature-flag lifecycle/sunset, client/admin route split, unified AI dispatch, and bounded-context service extraction. Added verifier command `npm run verify:adr-log` (`scripts/adr-log.ts`) with required-section and required-topic coverage checks plus unit tests (`tests/unit/adr-log.test.ts`). Added workflow playbook `docs/workflows/adr-log.md` and wired ADR verification into `verify-platform`.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 4 — Runtime & Operational Confidence
sprints.rationale: Improve runtime confidence: know when integrations fail, evaluate AI quality, recover data safely, observe operations, and protect tenant boundaries.

items.title: Integration Health Center
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added a typed workspace-scoped Integration Health Center contract (`shared/types/integration-health.ts`), backend aggregator endpoint (`GET /api/integrations/health/:workspaceId`) in `server/routes/health.ts`, and frontend Connections-tab surface with React Query wiring (`useIntegrationHealth`, `queryKeys.admin.integrationHealth`). Health cards now report configured/missing/degraded state for Webflow, Google auth, GSC, GA4, SEMRush, DataForSEO, Stripe, OpenAI, Anthropic, and SMTP, including quota-status placeholders, token expiry visibility for Google auth, and affected feature mapping. Added integration endpoint coverage (`tests/integration/health-routes.test.ts`) and hook coverage (`tests/component/useIntegrationHealth.test.tsx`).

items.title: AI Reliability & Evaluation Harness
items.notes: Shipped Wave 4 AI reliability closeout: added shared reliability contracts (`shared/types/ai-reliability.ts`), canonical trace/scenario registry (`scripts/ai-reliability-registry.ts`), reliability report (`scripts/report-ai-reliability.ts`, markdown + `--json` + `--soft-gate`), pipeline wiring advisory report (`scripts/report-ai-pipeline-wiring.ts`), trace-map docs (`docs/testing/ai-reliability-pipeline-trace-map.md`), and new contract/unit/integration coverage (`tests/contract/ai-pipeline-trace-map.test.ts`, `tests/unit/ai-reliability-harness.test.ts`, `tests/integration/ai-critical-domain-reliability.test.ts`). Coverage now traces schema, content brief/review, SEO assist, client decision support, diagnostics, admin chat, client search chat, and brand/voice provenance-sensitive paths.

items.title: Data Integrity & Recovery Drills
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added repeatable data integrity and recovery tooling (npm run verify:data-integrity) with SQLite quick/integrity checks, foreign-key violation reporting, workspace-orphan detection across workspace-scoped tables, explicit cross-table consistency checks, and a canonical artifact preserve-vs-rebuild map. Added recovery runbook notes covering backup/restore drills and restore-based migration rollback flow, plus unit coverage for healthy and corrupted database scenarios.

items.title: Observability as Product Infrastructure
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added platform observability telemetry capture for operation traces, slow-route tracking, AI outcomes, external provider outcomes (SEMRush/DataForSEO), and job lifecycle traces. Added typed workspace observability contracts and report builder in shared and server modules, workspace-scoped API endpoint /api/observability/:workspaceId, and a CLI report via npm run verify:observability. The report covers failed jobs, external API failure rates and latency, AI cost and latency by feature, slow-route leaderboards, and critical sync last-success timestamps. Added workflow docs and integration coverage for the endpoint.

items.title: Release Safety Checklist & Smoke Flow
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added a practical release-safety workflow with roadmap-derived deploy notes and a repeatable checklist/report script (`npm run verify:release-safety`) covering feature-class release gates, staging smoke suite, rollback readiness, feature-flag rollout, and a post-release monitoring window. Added companion workflow documentation (`docs/workflows/release-safety.md`) with concrete command paths for health/smoke verification and release execution.

items.title: Recurring Permission & Tenant Boundary Audit
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: Added recurring tenant-boundary audit CLI with fail/warn/pass findings across workspace route guards, upload protection, Stripe webhook trust boundary, public serialization hygiene, known foreign-ID regression coverage, and client-user workspace assertion contracts. Added report wrapper, workflow doc, package scripts, and unit tests.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 3 — Silent-Failure Reduction Rails
sprints.rationale: Reduce correct-looking but miswired code by centralizing serializers, events, AI operation contracts, external fetch behavior, and workspace mutation lifecycle rails.

items.title: Client-Safe Serializer Layer
items.notes:
Create explicit serializers for high-value admin/client/public views such as toPublicWorkspaceView(), toClientInboxItem(), toClientSchemaView(), and toAdminSchemaView(). Goal: stop route handlers from hand-picking fields inline and reduce regressions where the backend stores a field but public/client endpoints forget to expose it.
Shipped 2026-05-14 in PR #734: added explicit client-safe/public/admin serializers across workspace/public, inbox, and schema read paths with contract coverage so route handlers no longer hand-pick field lists inline.

items.title: Domain Event Definitions
items.notes:
Layer a richer event registry over WS_EVENTS that documents event name, owning domain, producer routes/services, payload shape, query keys to invalidate, admin/client listeners, and related activity type. This should prevent drift where a broadcast exists but no listener handles it, or a listener expects a payload field that one emitter does not send.
Shipped 2026-05-14: added `scripts/platform-domain-event-definitions.ts` as the canonical WS event registry (owning context, producer/listener surfaces, invalidation hints, activity mappings), added advisory report CLI (`scripts/report-domain-event-definitions.ts`, markdown + --json), and unit coverage for full WS_EVENTS key coverage, stable report shape, and orphan producer/listener mapping detection.

items.title: AI Operation Registry
items.notes:
Build a registry for AI operations that declares feature/domain, provider/model, prose vs structured JSON, response schema/parser, research-mode expectations, cost-tracking key, timeout/retry policy, and whether the operation may run synchronously or must use the background job platform. This extends callAI() from a dispatcher into an auditable contract surface.
Shipped 2026-05-14: added server/ai-operation-registry.ts as the canonical contract map, extended callAI() to accept operation ids with registry-derived defaults (provider/model/feature/retry/timeout/responseFormat/researchMode), and wired representative high-value flows (content brief regenerate, schema plan, client search chat, content decay, keyword strategy synthesis, workspace context generation jobs). Added unit + contract coverage for registry integrity, dispatcher default/override behavior, and representative operation wiring.

items.title: Server External Fetch Helper
items.notes:
Create shared helpers for external/public web fetches and provider API fetches. Standardize timeouts, redirect behavior, user-agent/headers, safe URL handling, error classification, expected network TypeError handling, and logging. Migrate high-risk sitemap/page/image/provider fetch call sites first.
Shipped 2026-05-15: expanded `server/external-fetch.ts` with `fetchPublicWeb*`, `fetchProvider*`, and `fetchExternalBytes` helpers; added URL safety modes, DNS/private-address SSRF guards, redirect-chain revalidation, and explicit unsafe/timeout/network/http classification. Migrated high-risk call sites in semrush, dataforseo provider, sales audit, web scraper, rewrite-chat load-page, webflow alt-text image downloads, webflow-pages sitemap reads, and internal-links fetch paths. Added unit coverage for redirect-to-private, DNS-to-private, and IPv6-mapped loopback (`::ffff:7f00:1`) blocking plus integration coverage updates for rewrite-chat load-page safety behavior.

items.title: Workspace Mutation Helper
items.notes:
Introduce a lightweight runWorkspaceMutation-style helper for repeated mutation lifecycle pieces: workspace scoping, optional read-before-write context, transaction boundary, activity logging, broadcast event, error shape, and serialized response. Avoid over-abstracting Express; target high-churn workspace-scoped writes where missing activity/broadcast bugs are expensive.
Shipped 2026-05-15: promoted `runWorkspaceMutation` beyond the content-plan pilot by migrating `server/routes/client-actions.ts` admin/client mutation paths (create, admin update, public respond) to the shared lifecycle helper with route-specific error mapping and explicit read-before-write guards. Added helper-adoption contract coverage (`tests/contract/workspace-mutation-helper-adoption.test.ts`) and refreshed integration helper coverage naming (`tests/integration/workspace-mutation-helper-pilot.test.ts`) to keep the pattern auditable in high-churn workspace-scoped writes.

items.title: SEO Editor Job Safety + Page Edit State Wiring
items.source: Backend Health + Content Quality Hardening PR 6
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-13: retired the synchronous AI `/api/webflow/seo-bulk-fix/:siteId` write route in favor of the existing `bulk-seo-fix` background job, added page-state broadcasts and activity context for background bulk fixes plus SEO suggestion select/dismiss mutations, removed the stale frontend bulk-fix wrapper, and switched SEO Editor reads to the all-pages source while preserving CMS manual-apply/write guards.

items.title: Unified SEO Editor Static + CMS Write Targets
items.notes:
PR #711 landed the shared SEO Editor write-target contract/resolver and CMS approval apply support, but staging smoke found product-quality issues in the unified surface: duplicated Sent to Client panels, unscoped approval history, CMS summaries that may already be truncated at source, and missing effective-title fallback semantics when a CMS item name is the practical SEO title. Follow-up hotfix gated the unified shell behind `seo-editor-unified` (default off) so the legacy Pages / CMS Collections split remains active while these issues are resolved.
Shipped 2026-05-15: resolved unified-surface quality issues by rendering a single SEO-scoped `PendingApprovals` panel in unified mode (while disabling nested duplicates in static/CMS child sections), preserving scoped approval visibility. Added CMS effective-title fallback semantics so blank SEO-title fields fall back to item name in both write-target resolution and preview rendering. Removed extra UI truncation in CMS approval history/value summaries to avoid compounding already-truncated source values. Added/updated contract and unit coverage (`seo-editor-unified-flag-gate`, `seo-write-target-resolver`) for the new unified panel and fallback behavior.

items.title: Route-to-Service Extraction Pilot
items.notes:
Choose one bounded context, preferably Schema or Inbox, and move business logic out of route files into server/domains/<domain>/ while preserving all existing URLs, response shapes, broadcasts, activity logs, and tests. Treat this as a proof of the organization pattern before expanding it.
Shipped 2026-05-15: completed an Inbox route-to-service extraction pilot by introducing `server/domains/inbox/client-actions-mutations.ts` and delegating admin create/update + public respond mutation orchestration from `server/routes/client-actions.ts` into the domain module while preserving route URLs, response shapes, activity logging, broadcasts, and side effects (email + playbook enqueue). Also promoted `runWorkspaceMutation` helper ownership to `server/workspace-mutation-helper.ts` (with route shim compatibility) and refreshed the mutation-helper adoption contract to enforce helper usage on the extracted inbox domain module. Added extraction contract coverage (`tests/contract/inbox-route-service-extraction.test.ts`) plus targeted route/integration verification for behavior parity.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 2b — Critical Test Coverage Hardening
sprints.rationale: Raise confidence in the highest-risk product domains before chasing global 80-90% coverage. Current baseline from 2026-05-13 coverage run: 32.31% lines, 30.66% statements, 24.64% branches, 24.30% functions. The first goal is critical-domain behavior coverage, not vanity global line coverage.

items.title: Critical Domain Coverage Baseline + Ownership Matrix
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-13: added `docs/testing/critical-domain-coverage-baseline.md`, `scripts/report-critical-domain-coverage.ts`, `tests/unit/critical-domain-coverage-report.test.ts`, and `npm run verify:coverage-baseline`. The advisory report covers every canonical bounded context with critical surfaces, existing test signals, known gaps, target coverage posture, and recommended next test slices while preserving the current 2026-05-13 global baseline.

items.title: P0 Auth, Billing, Workspace, and Public Route Contract Tests

Closeout shipped 2026-05-14: completed remaining P0 auth/billing seams with route-level webhook ingress contracts (`/api/stripe/webhook` missing signature, verification failure, and success path), and validated the broader contract matrix across `wave2b-route-contracts`, `public-portal-auth`, `stripe-admin-auth`, `stripe-checkout-flow`, `stripe-webhooks`, `stripe-webhook-idempotency`, `journey-payment-tier-upgrade`, and `tier-gate-enforcement`.

items.title: P0 Mutation Safety Suite
items.notes: Focused slice shipped 2026-05-13: added mutation lifecycle coverage for work-order status updates/completion and admin approval create/delete paths, including DB writes, workspace scoping, activity logging, WS_EVENTS-based broadcasts, page-state side effects, public/admin read paths, and source-level invalidation contracts for approval/work-order events. Schema mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-13: added coverage for schema plan send-to-client, client schema feedback, publish/retract/delete/rollback, snapshot/page-state/activity/history/broadcast side effects, and no-side-effect failure/cross-workspace cases; fixed schema-plan feedback to broadcast the schema-plan event so client schema caches refresh. Content request/review mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-13: added coverage for public create/submit, admin patch/delete, client approve/request-changes/decline/upgrade/comment, post-review decisions, inbox/page-state side effects, broadcasts, activity, and no-side-effect invalid/cross-workspace cases. Client action/background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-13: added coverage for admin/public client-action lifecycle contracts, actor attribution, no-side-effect invalid/cross-workspace cases, content_decay action-playbook success/failure writes, content brief read paths, job state, activity, broadcasts, and invalidation contracts. Billing mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added Stripe/content-subscription lifecycle coverage and billing broadcast contracts; fixed content subscription webhooks so they no longer overwrite workspace platform plan subscription state, emit workspace tier updates with null tier payloads, or skip known content subscriptions when Stripe metadata is missing, moved content-subscription broadcasts onto WS_EVENTS constants, wired admin/client invalidation for subscription lifecycle events, and added activity/status handling for content subscription status changes. SEO background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for bulk analyze, bulk rewrite, and bulk accept-fixes jobs across job creation/completion, page_keywords/seo_suggestions/page_edit_states writes, activity logging, WS_EVENTS broadcasts, admin read-path visibility, and no-side-effect invalid/cross-workspace starts; no runtime fixes were required. Content post generation mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `/api/content-posts/:workspaceId/generate`, including skeleton creation, background job completion/failure state, content_posts persistence, activity logging, CONTENT_UPDATED/POST_UPDATED broadcasts, admin read-path visibility, and no-side-effect missing-brief or duplicate-start cases; no runtime fixes were required. Keyword strategy background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `keyword-strategy`, including persisted `keywordStrategy`/page_keywords/content_gaps/quick_wins writes, activity logging, STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts, tracked-keyword seeding, usage reservation/refund behavior, no-op incremental completions, duplicate-start rejection, and no-side-effect failure handling; no runtime fixes were required. Page-analysis background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `page-analysis`, including page_keywords persistence, activity logging, STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts, graceful skipped-page completion on per-page AI failure, duplicate-start rejection, and no-side-effect cross-workspace starts; fixed the route to reject mismatched `workspaceId`/`siteId` pairs before a job can start writing into another workspace. Billing edge-case follow-up slice shipped 2026-05-14: expanded content-subscription lifecycle coverage for paused/incomplete status mapping plus malformed `customer.subscription.updated` and `customer.subscription.deleted` events with no metadata/local row, asserting strict no-op behavior (no workspace mutation, no activity writes, no broadcasts) when ownership context is absent. Schema-generator background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `schema-generator`, including snapshot persistence, `schema_generated` activity logging, `WS_EVENTS.SCHEMA_SNAPSHOT_UPDATED` broadcasts, admin/public schema snapshot read-path visibility, duplicate-start rejection, and strict no-side-effect cross-workspace or failure behavior. Workspace-context background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added lifecycle coverage for legacy and canonical starts (`/api/workspaces/:id/generate-brand-voice` and `POST /api/jobs`) across brand-voice, knowledge-base, and persona jobs, including deterministic done/error job state, stable result payload shape for admin reads, one-time `voice_calibrated` action recording plus `OUTCOME_ACTION_RECORDED` broadcast for brand-voice, no duplicate action/broadcast on repeat runs, and no-side-effect duplicate/failure behavior. Deep-diagnostic background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `deep-diagnostic`, including completed/failed report states, job terminal state, insight report-stamp persistence, diagnostic activity logging, DIAGNOSTIC_COMPLETE/DIAGNOSTIC_FAILED broadcasts, read-path visibility, duplicate-start rejection, and cross-workspace no-side-effect contracts. Legacy jobs mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic lifecycle coverage for `seo-audit`, `bulk-seo-fix`, and `sales-report` jobs, including done/error job state, workspace/site isolation, activity/broadcast side effects on success, and strict no-side-effect behavior for invalid, duplicate, and cross-workspace starts. Media jobs mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic lifecycle coverage for `compress`, `bulk-compress`, and `bulk-alt` jobs, including done/error state handling, duplicate-start/cross-workspace guards, summary activity behavior, and strict no-side-effect behavior on failed fetch/generation paths. Contract matrix slice shipped 2026-05-14: added background-job coverage contracts and high-risk mutation route matrix guardrails to keep lifecycle coverage anchored as new job types and route families are added. Webflow CMS mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `PATCH /api/webflow/collections/:collectionId/items/:itemId` and `POST /api/webflow/collections/:collectionId/publish`, asserting success-path page-state writes/activity/broadcast/read visibility and strict no-side-effect behavior for provider failures and cross-workspace site mismatches. SEO provider-failure closeout slice shipped 2026-05-14: added all-failed safeguards for SEO bulk background jobs (`seo-bulk-analyze`, `seo-bulk-rewrite`, `seo-bulk-accept-fixes`) so provider-wide failures now end in terminal `error` (not phantom `done`) and added lifecycle assertions for no mutation/activity/success-broadcast side effects when every item fails. Copy batch mutation-safety closeout shipped 2026-05-14: added lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/copy/:workspaceId/:blueprintId/batch`, including deterministic success/all-failed terminal states, activity and WS_EVENTS batch broadcast assertions, read-path visibility via `GET /api/copy/:workspaceId/batch/:batchId`, and strict no-side-effect malformed/cross-workspace guards; fixed the route to reject missing or cross-workspace blueprints before any batch job/activity/broadcast side effects.

items.title: External Failure + State Machine Coverage
items.notes: Mock Webflow, Stripe, Google, DataForSEO, SEMrush, OpenAI, and Anthropic failure modes and assert failed/error states rather than phantom success. Expand transition-guard tests for approval items, content requests, client actions, work orders, content subscriptions, posts, and background jobs so illegal transitions fail consistently. Focused transition-guard slice shipped 2026-05-14: expanded unit coverage to include full valid/invalid transition matrices for `CLIENT_ACTION_TRANSITIONS` and `BRIEFING_DRAFT_TRANSITIONS`, closing state-machine coverage gaps in those two entities while this roadmap item remains pending for broader external-provider failure breadth. External-failure contract slice shipped 2026-05-14: added provider-matrix guardrails plus exhaustive state-machine graph contracts to keep failure and transition coverage from silently regressing as routes/providers evolve. Webflow CMS external-failure + state-machine slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level failure contracts that assert no phantom page-state/activity/broadcast success on upstream Webflow write failures and added background-job transition maps plus runtime guard coverage so terminal jobs cannot silently reopen. SEO provider-failure hardening slice shipped 2026-05-14: added explicit mutation-safety coverage for OpenAI-powered bulk analyze/rewrite failures and Webflow update failures in bulk accept-fixes, plus DataForSEO/SEMrush-path keyword-strategy provider fetch failure assertions, and expanded provider matrix contracts to keep these failure signals anchored. Closeout slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic brand-identity AI write-failure contracts (no deliverable/version/activity/usage side effects on provider failure), enforced runtime `CONTENT_SUB_TRANSITIONS` in `updateContentSubscription`, expanded subscription transitions for Stripe `incomplete` recovery (`active|paused|past_due -> pending`), and added a state-machine guard coverage contract to keep validateTransition wiring anchored across all critical status entities.

items.title: Client Workflow Component Tests + E2E Smoke Journeys
items.notes: Add focused component/workflow tests for Client Portal and Inbox decisions/conversations/reviews, schema review, content request/review, tier gates, empty/error/loading states, and tab deep-link behavior. Add a small E2E smoke pack for admin send-to-client -> client decision -> admin update, billing/tier gate visibility, background job progress/result, and schema/content publish flows. Keep this to high-value journeys rather than exhaustive UI snapshots. Focused smoke slice shipped 2026-05-14: added a Playwright client workflow smoke pack that validates admin->client->admin decision convergence, public tier/billing visibility coherence, deep-link URL stability (`/client/:workspaceId/inbox?tab=decisions`), and async background-job status surfaces. Lane B confidence slice shipped 2026-05-14: added Inbox IA component deep-link workflow coverage (canonical + legacy inbox tabs, beta reviews fallback, empty-state behavior), expanded public/client serialization contracts to include `/api/public/workspace/:id` and `/api/public/intelligence/:workspaceId` safe-shape assertions, and extended the Playwright smoke pack with content-publish + schema-plan visibility checks. Closeout shipped 2026-05-14: expanded Inbox workflow matrix coverage for loading/empty/error surfaces, added deep-link routability smoke for conversations/reviews, and hardened Playwright route navigation by handling dev-server client-route fallback and first-visit onboarding overlays so CI/local smoke remains deterministic.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Hardening Pass
sprints.rationale: Data normalization, validation coverage, test gaps, and small code-quality fixes that reduce future bug surface.

items.title: Content Post — Statistics Provenance Check
items.notes: Two-part improvement to reduce hallucinated statistics in generated content. (1) Brief-grounding constraint: during brief generation, extract and tag specific statistics found in scraped SERP/competitor/knowledge-base sources as verifiedStats[]. Inject a generation-time instruction to only cite numbers present in the brief research; use directional language ('significantly faster') when no sourced number exists. (2) Post-generation provenance flag: after unification pass, regex-match all numeric claims in the output and cross-reference against the brief research text. Any number not traceable to a source gets flagged in the PostEditor review checklist for human verification before publish. No automated fact-checking; the goal is surfacing the risk to the reviewer, not replacing judgment.

Added shared Page Address contract (`canonicalPath`, `canonicalUrl`, `rawSlug`, `source`, `legacyFallbackPath`) with mirrored server/frontend helpers; routed high-risk callers through canonical normalization: single-page PageSpeed fallback, SEO rewrite/page HTML fetches, Page Intelligence prompt context, AEO page matching, approval/schema outcome tracking, direct SEO saves, audit traffic joins, and admin/client fix-context matching. items.title: Shared WebSocket event bus — eliminate per-hook WS connections
items.source: Platform Health Sprint PR1 Devin review (2026-04-14)
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08. Replaced per-hook socket construction in useWorkspaceEvents with a shared workspace-scoped event bus (`src/hooks/workspaceEventBus.ts`) so all listeners in a workspace reuse one WebSocket connection. Preserved auth sequencing (authenticate -> subscribe -> identify), including auth-failure fallback (subscribe without identify), added explicit unsubscribe-before-close semantics for final listener teardown, and kept reconnect behavior gated on active listeners. Added dedicated unit coverage in `tests/unit/workspace-event-bus.test.ts` for connection sharing, auth success/failure flows, unsubscribe teardown, send forwarding, and reconnect lifecycle. Full gates green: typecheck, vite build, vitest, pr-check.

items.title: Page Rewriter: expand HTML tokenizer to capture <div>, <li>, <blockquote> body text
items.notes:
extractPageSections() only tokenizes and

tags. Pages using

wrappers for body text (common in Webflow CMS templates) produce sections with empty body fields. Expand the two-pass tokenizer to also capture
  • ,
    , and non-empty
    text nodes. Deferred from PR #159.

Added unit coverage in tests/unit/work-orders-json-validation.test.ts for malformed object payload fallback and mixed-type array filtering. Added schema-sync coverage in tests/unit/workspace-validation.test.ts for extended PageKeywordMap optional fields (including GSC/analysis/SERP fields) to guard against future drift. Recommendations and reports were already on parseJsonSafe + Zod schemas; this item is now fully closed.
