items.title: Normalize quickWins into dedicated SQLite table
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08 on codex/hardening-reconcile-content-gaps-roadmap. Added migration `server/db/migrations/087-quick-wins.sql` and dedicated persistence module `server/quick-wins.ts` (list/replace/delete/count + JSON-blob backfill migration). `keyword-strategy-persistence.ts` now writes quick wins to `quick_wins`, strips stale blob copies, and stores prior quick-wins table state in strategy-history snapshots. Reader wiring now reassembles quick wins in `server/routes/keyword-strategy.ts` and `server/routes/public-content.ts` (with table-first fallback to legacy blob data), and recommendations now source quick wins from the table (`server/recommendations.ts`). Added unit coverage in `tests/unit/quick-wins.test.ts` and updated integration seeding in `tests/integration/client-strategy.test.ts` to assert table-backed behavior.

items.title: Normalize keywordGaps into dedicated SQLite table
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08 on codex/hardening-normalize-keyword-gaps. Added migration `server/db/migrations/088-keyword-gaps.sql` and dedicated persistence module `server/keyword-gaps.ts` (list/replace/delete/count + JSON-blob backfill migration). `keyword-strategy-persistence.ts` now writes keyword gaps to `keyword_gaps`, strips stale blob copies, and stores prior keyword-gap table state in strategy-history snapshots. Reader wiring now reassembles keyword gaps in `server/routes/keyword-strategy.ts` and `server/routes/public-content.ts` (with table-first fallback to legacy blob data), and incremental cached SEO-data restore now reads table-backed keyword gaps in `server/keyword-strategy-seo-data.ts`. Added unit coverage in `tests/unit/keyword-gaps.test.ts` and integration coverage in `tests/integration/client-strategy.test.ts` and `tests/integration/keyword-strategy-partial-state.test.ts`.

items.title: Normalize topicClusters into dedicated SQLite table
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08 on codex/hardening-normalize-topic-clusters. Added migration `server/db/migrations/089-topic-clusters.sql` and dedicated persistence module `server/topic-clusters.ts` (list/replace/delete/count + JSON-blob backfill migration). `keyword-strategy-persistence.ts` now writes topic clusters to `topic_clusters`, strips stale blob copies, and stores prior topic-cluster table state in strategy-history snapshots. Strategy reader/writer wiring now reassembles topic clusters in `server/routes/keyword-strategy.ts` (table-first fallback to legacy blob, shell-state support, strict PATCH validation). Added unit coverage in `tests/unit/topic-clusters.test.ts` and integration coverage in `tests/integration/keyword-strategy-partial-state.test.ts` for table-backed patch/shell behavior. PR 3 hardening follow-up adds public `/api/public/seo-strategy/:workspaceId` serialization for table-backed topic clusters plus shell-state parity, and wraps strategy table replacements in one transaction to prevent mixed-generation normalized state.

items.title: Normalize cannibalization into dedicated SQLite table
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08 on codex/hardening-normalize-cannibalization. Added migration `server/db/migrations/090-cannibalization-issues.sql` and dedicated persistence module `server/cannibalization-issues.ts` (list/replace/delete/count + JSON-blob backfill migration). `keyword-strategy-persistence.ts` now writes cannibalization issues to `cannibalization_issues`, strips stale blob copies, and stores prior cannibalization table state in strategy-history snapshots. Strategy reader/writer wiring now reassembles cannibalization in `server/routes/keyword-strategy.ts` (table-first fallback to legacy blob, shell-state support, strict PATCH validation). Added unit coverage in `tests/unit/cannibalization-issues.test.ts` and integration coverage in `tests/integration/keyword-strategy-partial-state.test.ts` for table-backed patch/shell behavior. PR 3 hardening follow-up preserves canonical action metadata (`canonicalPath`, `canonicalUrl`, `action`) through shared types, storage, admin/public reads, and history snapshots; it also adds public strategy serialization parity, feedback-delete invalidation, provider-grounding status, and atomic normalized strategy persistence.

items.title: Verify client_signal → 'internal' category mapping in email-throttle
items.notes:
server/email-throttle.ts has a guessed mapping of the client_signal insight category to 'internal' throttle bucket. Needs human review — confirm this matches intent or adjust. Low risk because it only affects email throttle grouping, not correctness. Flagged during the typecheck cleanup.
Verified 2026-05-06: server/email-throttle.ts maps client_signal to the internal bucket alongside request_new/content_request/payment_received, which matches intent because client signals notify the agency/admin inbox and should not count toward client email caps.

items.title: Remove applyScoreAdjustment return-type escape hatches
items.notes:
anomaly-detection.ts:639 and outcome-tracking.ts:329 use `data: newData as never` because applyScoreAdjustment returns Partial<AnalyticsInsight> which doesn't overlap with the narrow discriminated union of InsightDataMap. Fix by making applyScoreAdjustment generic over InsightType so it preserves the data shape through the score adjustment. Blocked on #580.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: applyScoreAdjustment is generic over T extends Record<string, unknown> and anomaly-detection.ts/outcome-tracking.ts no longer use `data: newData as never` at the bridge call sites.

items.title: Refactor detectCompetitorAlerts: separate computation from DB persistence
items.source: TECH DEBT — scaled code review on PR #267 (feat/seo-tier2-capabilities)
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08. detectCompetitorAlerts() in server/competitor-snapshot-store.ts is now pure (no DB writes), with inserts moved into saveCompetitorAlerts(alerts). Intelligence cron wiring now calls detect + save in sequence. Added/updated tests pinning the two-step contract: no persisted alerts until saveCompetitorAlerts is called, then expected unlinked-alert/list/link behavior.

items.title: Move Phase 5 (emerging_keyword) and Phase 6 (freshness_alert) to after Phase 4 in analytics-intelligence.ts
items.source: TECH DEBT — scaled code review on PR #267
items.notes:
Phase 5 (line ~1309) and Phase 6 (line ~1349) are currently inserted between Phase 3B and Phase 3C, contradicting the new rule 8.3 in docs/rules/analytics-insights.md (phases must be appended after the last existing phase). Pure code motion — no logic change, no dependency conflicts. Deferred from PR #267 to avoid mixing functional bug fixes with pure reorder churn.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: server/analytics-intelligence.ts now orders Phase 3A, Phase 3B, Phase 3C, Phase 4, then Phase 5 emerging_keyword and Phase 6 freshness_alert. The deferred pure code-motion item is complete.

items.title: Add direct unit test for Phase 6 content freshness detection logic
items.source: TECH DEBT — scaled code review on PR #267
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08. Extracted Phase 6 freshness detection into pure helper `computeFreshnessAlerts()` in server/analytics-intelligence.ts and added direct unit coverage in tests/unit/analytics-intelligence.test.ts. Tests now pin: 90-day+100-impression inclusion threshold, exactly-180-day warning boundary, >180-day critical severity, stale low-impression exclusion, invalid/missing analysis date exclusion, insightType literal, and data payload mapping.

items.title: Unify empty-state behavior for new Tier 2 InsightCards (grid gap fix)
items.source: UX — scaled code review on PR #267
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08. Removed growth/premium null-return short-circuits in CompetitorAlertCard, EmergingKeywordCard, and FreshnessAlertCard so all Tier 2 cards stay mounted and render lightweight empty states when data is absent. Added component coverage in tests/component/InsightCards.test.tsx to assert all three card titles and empty-state copy render for growth tier without tier-2 insights.

items.title: Content Briefs — template cross-reference
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08 on codex/hardening-content-briefs-template-crossref. Added `GET /api/content-briefs/:workspaceId/template-crossref?keyword=...` to resolve matrix-cell keyword matches (custom keyword precedence over target keyword), return matched template metadata, and provide sorted template sections. Brief generation now auto-injects matched template sections/style/title/meta patterns, locks keyword source to `template`, and falls back page type from the matched template when incoming page type is absent/invalid. Admin Brief Generator now shows a matched-template callout and auto-prefills page type from the crossref. Added integration coverage for missing keyword 400, no-match null response, and custom-keyword precedence + section ordering behavior.

items.title: Workspace Home — content velocity metric
items.notes: Shipped / verified 2026-05-08 on codex/hardening-normalize-content-gaps. Added workspace-home `contentVelocity` payload from `getContentVelocityTrend()` in server/content-posts-db.ts and surfaced a new hero StatCard on Workspace Home showing trailing 3-month avg posts/month, month-over-month trend %, and current-month published count. Hardening included zero-fill month buckets, null trend for zero/insufficient baseline windows, and test-order-independent velocity unit coverage.

items.title: BriefDetail dedup + type consolidation (Unit A + B)
items.notes: Replaced ~240 lines of inline brief JSX in RequestList.tsx with a single <BriefDetail> component call via new hideActions/defaultFeedback/autoShowRegenerate props. Consolidated ContentBrief and ContentTopicRequest types from 4 component files into shared/types/content.ts canonical source. Added SERP data rendering (realPeopleAlsoAsk, realTopResults) in BriefDetail.

items.title: Content pipeline bug fixes — 7 server-side fixes (Unit C)
items.notes: Bug 2: Clear clientFeedback on resubmit. Bug 3: Upgrade endpoint try/catch for InvalidTransitionError. Bug 4: send-to-client initialStatus changed to brief_generated. Bug 5: Client can view post in changes_requested status. Bug 6: postId only exposed when serviceType=full_post. Bug 7: Double skeleton save prevention. Bug 8: State machine — removed post_review from changes_requested transitions, Re-queue for Revision button.

items.title: Email notification for changes_requested (Unit D)
items.notes: Added content_changes_requested event type to email system. notifyTeamChangesRequested called from both brief and post change-request endpoints in public-content.ts. Throttle category mapped to 'internal'.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Consolidation
sprints.rationale: Verified against origin/staging eb0a5832 on 2026-05-04. Phase 0 baseline confirms rapid product expansion left uneven background-generation coverage, duplicate implementations, partially completed migrations, and large feature modules that now slow safe iteration.

items.title: Phase 0 baseline - verify platform consolidation audit against staging
items.notes: Completed against origin/staging eb0a5832 on 2026-05-04. Confirmed no relevant stash already contained this work, inventoried admin generation surfaces, decided TaskPanel/useBackgroundTasks should be the canonical job UX foundation, classified drifted synchronous/partial generation paths, and defined Phase 1 background-generation contract, UX, and guardrail targets.

items.title: Background generation contract - shared job metadata and start policy
items.notes: Completed in Phase 1 on 2026-05-04. Added docs/rules/background-generation.md, shared/types/background-jobs.ts, shared job labels/cancellation semantics/result behavior, and server default messages based on the shared metadata. This makes existing /api/jobs + TaskPanel conventions the official platform contract without migrating Phase 2 generation flows yet.

items.title: Background generation UX - TaskPanel parity foundation
items.notes: Completed in Phase 1 on 2026-05-04. TaskPanel now consumes shared job metadata, labels feature-specific SEO bulk jobs, shows stop only for abort-aware jobs, filters by current workspace, and avoids globally destructive clear-completed behavior in the filtered panel. useBackgroundTasks now exposes active/latest-terminal lookup helpers for Phase 2 surfaces. Shared WebSocket work remains coordinated with #587; notification hub merge remains scoped to #503.

items.title: Background generation guardrails - prevent new synchronous admin generation drift
items.notes: Completed in Phase 1 on 2026-05-04. Added a warning pr-check rule, fixture coverage, verified-clean registry entry, generated automated-rules docs, and a background-generation-ok hatch for reviewed exceptions. The rule starts narrowly by catching unallowlisted post-response generation in audited high-churn routes.

items.title: Background generation Phase 2 - migrate drifted long-running generation flows
items.notes: Completed across staged Phase 2 slices by 2026-05-05. KeywordStrategyPanel starts the existing keyword-strategy job through useBackgroundTasks instead of direct SSE; content post generation is job-backed with step progress and cancellation; schema/page-analysis cancellation stays durable after abort-controller cleanup; SEO bulk workers unregister abort controllers; shared schema generation context prep is extracted; schema/page-analysis worker bodies are extracted from server/routes/jobs.ts into dedicated worker modules while the route remains the dispatcher; PageIntelligence rediscovers active page-analysis jobs after navigation/reload so inline progress derives from the same TaskPanel job state; schema snapshot generation, publish, rollback, retract, and delete paths now broadcast schema:snapshot_updated and invalidate admin/client React Query caches; BrandHub knowledge base, brand voice, and persona generation now run through shared background jobs with sessionStorage recovery for completed drafts after navigation.

items.title: Page analysis worker hardening - clarify empty states and fetch failure handling
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/page-analysis-worker-hardening. Page-analysis jobs now finish with a clear no-pages-discovered message, set a user-facing terminal message when OPENAI_API_KEY is missing, and skip AI calls with warning/accounting when all page HTML fetch attempts fail instead of analyzing empty content.

items.title: Billing architecture - consolidate on Stripe Checkout
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-04 in codex/billing-checkout-only. Removed the legacy /api/stripe/create-payment-intent endpoint, deleted the Stripe Elements payment form, simplified client purchases to always create Stripe Checkout sessions, and updated Stripe tests/mocks so Checkout remains the only client purchase architecture. Webhook PaymentIntent handling remains only for Stripe Checkout reconciliation and failure events; the payment_intent.succeeded handler now also finds Checkout-reconciled records by stripePaymentIntentId to avoid false missing-payment errors after hosted Checkout completion.

items.title: Client portal data - finish React Query migration and retire useClientData facade
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/client-data-react-query-slice. Retired src/hooks/useClientData.ts, moved its exported client data helper types into src/components/client/types.ts, and made ClientDashboard compose useClientSearch, useClientGA4, and the focused hooks from src/hooks/client/useClientQueries.ts directly. Preserved query-cache setters for approvals/content requests, workspace-event invalidation keys, date-range query behavior, and pricing hydration through useClientPricing.

items.title: Deep-link contract sweep - fix senders whose ?tab= targets ignore search params
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/tab-deeplink-contracts. StrategyTab now reads useSearchParams/searchParams.get('tab') and maps client briefing ?tab=content-gaps deep links to the Create Content accordion section. Extended tests/contract/tab-deep-link-wiring.test.ts to cover clientPath senders as well as adminPath senders, including client StrategyTab and InboxTab receivers.

items.title: Keyword strategy generation - start through shared background jobs
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-04 in codex/platform-keyword-strategy-background-job. Superseded the admin direct-SSE caller by starting BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY through useBackgroundTasks, deriving the generating state from the active job, preserving SSE progress inside the worker, and fixing internal job route bridges to use signed admin tokens. The legacy SSE endpoint and streamKeywordStrategy helper remain for compatibility until the backend service extraction follow-up removes the internal route-fetch bridge.

items.title: Content post generation - migrate brief-to-post flow to background jobs
items.source: Phase 2 background generation follow-up surfaced during codex/platform-keyword-strategy-background-job
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/content-post-background-jobs. Moved POST /api/content-posts/:workspaceId/generate off legacy post-response generation and onto the shared jobs store with BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.CONTENT_POST_GENERATION metadata so TaskPanel can surface it. Preserved the immediate skeleton-post UX, returns jobId with the skeleton, added /api/jobs support for the same job type, kept generation non-cancellable until generatePost is abort-aware, and added route coverage for skeleton response plus persisted job lookup.

items.title: Content post generation - add step progress and cancellation
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/content-post-generation-progress. generatePost now reports durable job progress for context prep, introduction, each body section, conclusion, unification, SEO metadata, and finalization. Content post generation registers an AbortController, passes AbortSignal through content AI helper calls, marks cancelled drafts terminal in the content domain, and BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.CONTENT_POST_GENERATION is now cancellable in shared metadata.

items.title: Keyword strategy jobs - extract native service worker with progress callbacks
items.source: Phase 2 background generation follow-up surfaced during codex/platform-keyword-strategy-background-job
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/keyword-strategy-job-service. Extracted keyword strategy generation into server/keyword-strategy-generation.ts so the direct SSE route and BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY worker share native orchestration instead of the job worker internally fetching the route. Preserved active generation guards, billing reservation/refund behavior, persistence, broadcasts, history writes, rank seeding, recommendations, llms.txt regeneration, SSE progress, and job progress translation.

items.title: Background jobs - recover stale pending/running jobs after process restart
items.source: Follow-up surfaced during codex/keyword-strategy-job-service scaled review
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/background-job-stale-recovery. Startup recovery now has an explicit exported recovery path with regression coverage, marks persisted pending/running jobs as error after restart, updates the visible TaskPanel message as well as the error field, and keeps graceful-shutdown interruption messages aligned.

items.title: Generation activity parity - log direct and background generation consistently
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/generation-activity-parity. Keyword strategy success activity now logs from server/keyword-strategy-generation.ts after persistence, so direct SSE/API generation and BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY share the same activity behavior. Removed the job-wrapper strategy_generated log to prevent duplicate entries.

items.title: Webflow SEO suggestions - add list endpoint integration coverage
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/webflow-seo-route-coverage. Added route-level integration coverage for GET /api/webflow/seo-suggestions/:workspaceId, including counts and field filtering, after the low-risk Webflow SEO route split.

items.title: Webflow SEO copy - add happy-path integration coverage
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/webflow-seo-route-coverage. Added a mocked happy-path integration test for POST /api/webflow/seo-copy so the extracted page-tools route has explicit regression coverage.

items.title: AI dispatch - migrate general server generation paths to callAI
items.notes: Verified still valid on origin/staging eb0a5832. Completed across thirteen slices. Earlier slices migrated chat memory summaries, meeting briefs, monthly digests, content decay recommendations, internal link suggestions, SEO audit metadata recommendations, rewrite chat, Webflow keyword analysis, brandscript import, copy-intelligence pattern extraction, copy refresh suggestions, discovery extraction, copy voice feedback classification/suggestion generation, llms.txt page summaries, Webflow per-page SEO copy generation, page analysis jobs, bulk Webflow page analysis jobs, Google Search Console chat, workspace intelligence-profile autofill, anomaly digest summaries, keyword recommendation relevance ranking, and content post creative generation/SEO metadata/voice scoring. Final broad batch migrates the remaining general app generation paths: content briefs and outline regeneration, AEO page review, schema plan/template suggestions, keyword strategy synthesis, content publish field mapping, content post AI review, diagnostic synthesis, admin/client Search chat, jobs bulk SEO fixes, copy pipeline generation/regeneration, and blueprint generation. Claude review follow-up added JSON responseFormat defense to object-shaped parsers in the final batch plus meeting brief generation. Direct provider-helper usage now remains at the dispatcher/helper boundary, provider helper tests/usage exports, parseAIJson compatibility imports, and documented vision payload exceptions.

items.title: SEO provider boundary - finish Semrush/DataForSEO abstraction cleanup
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/seo-provider-keyword-strategy-consolidation. Keyword strategy generation now imports trend/SERP helpers from provider-neutral server/seo-provider-signals.ts instead of server/semrush.ts, while semrush.ts keeps compatibility re-exports for older tests/imports. Keyword strategy route/job/component paths use seoDataMode, keep legacy semrushMode fallback for existing callers and stored strategies, and return a provider-neutral seoDataMode alias from the admin strategy read path. useKeywordStrategy now derives availability from /api/seo-providers/status so DataForSEO-only workspaces enable SEO data mode. Keyword Strategy UI state/props/guide copy now use provider-neutral naming, and generation progress uses seo-data while jobs still label old semrush progress for compatibility.

items.title: Keyword strategy backend - split route monolith and sequence storage normalization
items.notes: Completed across six staged slices. First backend split slice completed 2026-05-05 in codex/keyword-strategy-generation-service-split: pure helper logic moved to server/keyword-strategy-helpers.ts and SEO provider collection moved to server/keyword-strategy-seo-data.ts while preserving the route wrapper, public re-exports, job/direct generation behavior, competitor cache writes, and provider data outputs. Second split slice completed 2026-05-05 in codex/keyword-strategy-generation-service-split-2: live-page discovery/content fetching moved to server/keyword-strategy-pages.ts and GSC/GA4 signal collection moved to server/keyword-strategy-search-data.ts while preserving progress labels, incremental fresh-page recovery, sitemap fallback behavior, and direct/background job compatibility. Third split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-ai-synthesis-split: AI prompt context assembly, page-batch mapping, keyword-pool construction, incremental preserve/merge handling, post-AI keyword validation, and master site-level synthesis moved to server/keyword-strategy-ai-synthesis.ts while preserving direct/background job compatibility, progress labels, declined/requested keyword guardrails, competitor brand filtering, invalid-master-JSON payloads, and incremental no-op refunds. Fourth split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-enrichment-split: post-synthesis enrichment moved into server/keyword-strategy-enrichment.ts, covering GSC/provider metric hydration, SERP targeting, content-gap scoring/sorting, cannibalization, topical authority clusters, site keyword metrics, quick-win ROI scoring, and final impact sorting while preserving direct/background job compatibility and existing progress labels. Fifth split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-persistence-split: page-keyword table persistence, strategy-history snapshots/pruning, workspace strategy blob writes, strategy_generated activity, STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts, cache/intelligence invalidation, and strategy outcome-action recording moved into server/keyword-strategy-persistence.ts while preserving full/incremental write semantics and direct/background job compatibility. Sixth split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-followons-split: tracked-keyword auto-seeding, keyword-strategy-triggered llms.txt regeneration, and deduped recommendation refreshes moved into server/keyword-strategy-follow-ons.ts while preserving response/follow-on ordering and shared direct-route/background-job orchestration. Storage normalization remains sequenced under existing items #365, #367, #368, #369, and #370.

items.title: Webflow SEO backend - split audit, rewrite, bulk jobs, and apply flows
items.notes: Completed in staged slices on 2026-05-04 and 2026-05-05. SEO suggestion routes moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-suggestions.ts, page HTML/SEO copy routes moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-page-tools.ts, single-page /api/webflow/seo-rewrite moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-rewrite.ts with shared limit handling, live /api/webflow/seo-bulk-fix and /api/webflow/seo-pattern-apply moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-apply.ts, legacy /api/webflow/seo-bulk-rewrite suggestion generation moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-bulk-rewrite.ts, /api/webflow/seo-audit moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-audit.ts, and /api/seo/:workspaceId background job start endpoints moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-jobs.ts. Bulk worker bodies live in server/webflow-seo-bulk-accept-fixes-job.ts, server/webflow-seo-bulk-rewrite-job.ts, and server/webflow-seo-bulk-analyze-job.ts. On-demand audit page-state marking and audit insight bridge handling live in server/webflow-seo-audit-bridges.ts. The old server/routes/webflow-seo.ts dispatcher has been retired without changing endpoint behavior.

items.title: Monolith split Phase 1 - extract low-risk Webflow SEO and pageElements boundaries
items.notes: Completed on 2026-05-04. Extracted SEO suggestion CRUD/apply routes and Webflow page tools from server/routes/webflow-seo.ts, registered the focused routers in server/route-groups/webflow.ts, and moved the read-only pageElements assembler/formatter to server/intelligence/page-elements-slice.ts with unit coverage. This preserves behavior while creating safe ownership boundaries for the larger monolith split sprint.

items.title: Client StrategyTab - split workflow state into hooks and sections
items.notes: Completed across seven staged slices on 2026-05-06. First slice extracted keyword feedback, tracked strategy keyword, and business-priority workflow state/API calls from StrategyTab into focused hooks. Second slice extracted the keyword detail drawer and shared keyword display helpers into client/strategy modules with static contract guards. Third slice extracted the Create Content/content-opportunity accordion into StrategyContentOpportunitiesSection with a static contract guard. Fourth slice extracted the Improve Pages quick-win/page-review accordion into StrategyPageImprovementsSection with a static contract guard. Fifth slice extracted the Guide This Strategy business-priority accordion into StrategyBusinessPrioritiesSection with a static contract guard, corrected the business-priorities deep-link scroll target, and aligned keyboard adds with the existing 10-priority cap. Sixth slice extracted the Strategy Keywords request/feedback surface, declined-keyword restore accordion, and decline-reason modal into focused strategy components with a static contract guard. Seventh slice completed the shell reduction from origin/staging 210f8cb by extracting the Strategy Snapshot, Recommended Next Steps, and Page Keyword Map accordion into focused strategy components while preserving tier gates, deep-link expansion, scroll callbacks, and feedback wiring.

items.title: Feature tool monoliths - split SchemaSuggester, PageIntelligence, SeoEditor, VoiceTab
items.notes: Verified still valid on origin/staging eb0a5832. SchemaSuggester, PageIntelligence, SeoEditor, and VoiceTab remain >1,000-line feature modules. PageIntelligence slices on 2026-05-06 have extracted pure display/scoring helpers, data derivation helpers for persisted-analysis hydration/search/sort/fix-queue ranking, the pages-tab header/control strip, the pages list/expanded detail renderer, page row/detail renderers, expanded detail strategy/analysis/persisted-summary/action sections, and parent workflow hooks for page-analysis jobs, keyword editing/tracking, and SEO copy state with unit/source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entries 344-350. SchemaSuggester generation workflow extraction now moves saved snapshot/page-type/page-picker/fix-context scan state and the shared schema-generator background job handling into useSchemaSuggesterGeneration, with source contract coverage and typed BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.SCHEMA_GENERATOR startup; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 351. SchemaSuggester CMS workflow extraction now moves CMS template page loading/generation/publish/copy state, schema CMS field-mapping query/mutation cache updates, and detected location/service mapping collection derivation into useSchemaSuggesterCmsWorkflow with source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 352. SchemaSuggester publishing workflow extraction now moves page publish/retract, client approval submission, manual-delivery, schema edit/copy, template-save, bulk publish, and edit-state refresh state into useSchemaSuggesterPublishingWorkflow with source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 353. SchemaSuggester results rendering extraction now moves schema impact display/fetch state plus page/validation/edit-status summary rendering into SchemaImpactPanel, SchemaResultsSummary, and SchemaEditStatusSummary with unit/source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 354. SchemaPageCard details extraction now moves existing-schema badges, validation finding grouping, recommendation banners, graph summaries, generation diagnostics, and rich-result eligibility into SchemaPageCardDetails with component coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 355. SchemaSuggester setup extraction now moves business-profile callout, generator hero actions, initial page type picker/guide, and CMS field mapping rendering into SchemaGeneratorSetup with component coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 356. Schema monolith cleanup is complete; stop here before SeoEditor and VoiceTab per sprint direction. SeoEditor decomposition resumed on 2026-05-07 with Phase 1 contract/type extraction (PR #602), Phase 2 derived-helper extraction for approval payload assembly plus page filtering/ranking logic (PR #603), Phase 3 bulk-helper extraction for pattern preview/apply payloads, bulk rewrite job request payloads, and static-page SEO/openGraph update payload assembly (PR #605), Phase 4 persistence-helper extraction for session cache/draft/job-id hydration and guardrail coverage (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 365), Phase 5 approval-workflow hook extraction (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 366) with filtered select-all mismatch hardening, Phase 6 page-workflow hook extraction for save/draft/rewrite/analyze orchestration (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 367), Phase 7 bulk-workflow hook extraction for analyze-all/bulk-fix/pattern/rewrite orchestration with page-state clear tracking consolidation and source contract coverage (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 368), Phase 8 shell-controls extraction for tracking summary/analyze controls/CMS toggle/search composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 369), Phase 9 header-action extraction for stats/refresh/fix/publish/action-banner composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 370), Phase 10 page-list extraction for CMS empty-state/banner and PageEditRow composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 371), Phase 11 workflow-panels extraction for pending approvals/unsaved banner/SEO suggestions/bulk-operations composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 372), and Phase 12 session-state hook extraction for cache hydration/persistence, fix-context auto-expand, and local expanded/preview state composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 373). VoiceTab decomposition resumed on 2026-05-07 with Phase 1 model/helper extraction that moved shared constants/defaults/mappings plus normalized dedupe helpers into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/voiceTabModel.ts`, added source-contract guardrails, and covered duplicate/whitespace edge cases in unit tests (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 374). VoiceTab Phase 2 now extracts the samples and DNA sections into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/SamplesSection.tsx` and `src/components/brand/voice-tab/DNASection.tsx`, preserving mutation/toast behavior while adding source-contract coverage to keep section ownership out of the root shell (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 375). VoiceTab Phase 3 now extracts guardrails and calibration surfaces into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/GuardrailsSection.tsx`, `src/components/brand/voice-tab/CalibrationSection.tsx`, and `src/components/brand/voice-tab/useVoiceCalibrationWorkflow.ts`, with source-contract coverage and preserved generate/refine/feedback/sample flows (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 376). VoiceTab Phase 4 now extracts profile query/mutation/tab-section orchestration into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/useVoiceTabShell.ts` with source-contract coverage that locks root-shell composition boundaries (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 377). With VoiceTab shell cleanup merged, this feature-tool monolith split item is now complete. Final closeout on 2026-05-08 also completed CmsEditor phases 1-7 and PageRewriteChat phases 1-7 (PRs #627 through #636), so this umbrella platform-consolidation split item is now fully done.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 2 approval workflow hook extraction

Bug sniffing hardening included: select-all now guards empty collections from false "all selected" toggles, and validation/network approval errors remain surfaced through the existing `ErrorState` UI path after extraction. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase2-approval-hook-extraction.test.ts`) and updated phase-1 contract assertions to match the new ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 3 AI rewrite workflow hook extraction

Extracted AI rewrite/variation workflow state and orchestration from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/useCmsEditorAiWorkflow.ts`, including AI loading state, rewrite request assembly, paired rewrite handling, variation application helpers, and session-storage-backed variation persistence. `CmsEditor.tsx` now consumes the hook and keeps composition-only wiring for AI controls. Bug sniffing hardening included: AI failures and empty/no-suggestion responses now surface user-visible `ErrorState` feedback (`aiError`) instead of silently failing. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase3-ai-workflow-hook-extraction.test.ts`) to lock the new ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 4 publish + bulk workflow hook extraction

Bug sniffing hardening included: bulk rewrite failure accounting now correctly tracks AI generation failures (not only thrown promise rejections) by having AI rewrite actions return explicit success booleans consumed by the bulk workflow. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase4-publish-bulk-hook-extraction.test.ts`) to lock the ownership boundary.

Added source-contract and hook-behavior guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase5-shell-state-hook-extraction.test.ts`, `tests/unit/cms-editor-shell-state-hook.test.ts`) to lock the new ownership boundary.

Bug sniffing hardening included: phase-1 contract assertions were updated to stop pinning now-extracted render helper usage in root (`filterAndRankCollectionItems`) while preserving model ownership checks, and a pre-existing purple paired-description label was corrected to blue to align with color-system rules. items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 7 shell panel + save workflow cleanup

Added phase-7 source contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase7-shell-save-cleanup.test.ts`) and dedicated save workflow unit coverage (`tests/unit/cms-editor-save-workflow.test.ts`). sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Completed items from Future (Historical Done/Deferred Archive)
sprints.rationale: Completed items extracted from active sprint sprint-future during roadmap cleanup so active roadmap views show remaining work only.
sprints.notes: Extracted on 2026-06-11. Original sprint retained pending/in-progress/deferred items only.

items.title: Schema Page-Element Catalog PR1 — slice + 3 element types + 3 schema integrations
items.notes: PageElementSlice + page_elements table + extractors for videos/HowTo/citations + VideoObject/HowTo/Article.citation[] schema integrations on Article + BlogPosting. No AI in PR1. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-page-element-catalog-design.md. Audit: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-04-29-page-element-catalog-audit.md.

items.title: Schema Page-Element Catalog PR2 — images + tables + testimonials
items.notes: Shipped 3 pattern extractors (images w/ rule-based hero/informative/decorative + AI vision classifier; tables w/ pricing+comparison heuristics; testimonials w/ author+rating) + 2 AI extractors (vision image-role classifier via openai SDK direct, HowTo disambiguation via callAI) behind schema-ai-element-classifier flag (default off, 120-call shared per-run AiBudget). Threaded one AiBudget per regenerate-all through generateSchemaSuggestions's 3 generateLeanSchema sites (Devin r5 follow-up). Added 4 validator REQUIRED_BY_TYPE entries (Review/AggregateRating/Table/ImageGallery) + 3 schema integrations: ImageGallery (Article+Service), Review[]+AggregateRating (Service+LocalBusiness), Table mainEntity (Service). Pre-emission gates on every new node type (synchronous, per PR1 Devin r2 lesson). 4 new HTML fixtures + 6 new test files + extended integration tests.

items.title: Schema Workstream C — Entity Graph Hub Dispatch
items.notes: Workstream C shipped: hub pages now emit semantically correct schema types with cross-page @id references via assembleSiteContext + SiteContext plumbing into generateLeanSchema. BlogIndex → Blog with blogPost[] (@id refs, sorted newest-first, capped at 10, numberOfItems = true count). ServiceIndex → Service + hasOfferCatalog: { @type: OfferCatalog, hasPart[] }. CaseStudyIndex → CollectionPage + mainEntity: { @type: ItemList, itemListElement[] (positional ListItems) }. All three fall back to CollectionPage when siteContext is absent. Non-hub pages (BlogPosting, Service, AboutPage, etc.) unchanged. 18 integration tests in tests/integration/schema-entity-graph.test.ts.

items.title: Schema Semantic Extraction & AI-Powered Generation
items.notes: AI-powered universal page content extraction layer for schema generation. extractSemanticData() (Haiku 4.5 tool_use) extracts phone, address, hours, staff, services, aggregateRating, sameAs, faq, primaryImage per page — stored on PageElementCatalog.semantics. applyPostEnrichment() appends FAQPage/AggregateRating/sameAs/VideoObject nodes to generated schema using extracted semantics with rollback-on-new-errors safety. generateSchemaForUnknownType() generates WebPage-classified pages with non-empty semantics via second Haiku call + static SCHEMA_TYPE_REFERENCE. Validator extended with DEDICATED_VALIDATOR_TYPES guard, unverified-type warnings for unknown Schema.org types, addressCountry in ContactPage. GSC URL Inspection integration: inspectUrlForRichResults() calls GSC API 3 minutes after publish, stores google_validation_status on schema_publish_history. schema.org pre-publish validator: validateWithSchemaOrg() fires at generation time (fire-and-forget, logs only). Migrations 081 (google_validation_status on schema_publish_history) + 082 (schema_org_validation_status on schema_snapshots). WS_EVENTS.SCHEMA_GOOGLE_VALIDATION added. 9 new/modified test files; 5805 tests passing.

items.title: Migrate buildSchemaContext direct reads to intelligence slices
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. buildSchemaContext now reads schema context from `buildWorkspaceIntelligence({ slices: ['seoContext'] })` for businessContext, knowledgeBase, personas, siteKeywords, and business profile (including structured address + foundedDate/numberOfEmployees via seoContext.businessProfile). Legacy `ctx.brandVoice` assignment was removed as dead schema context. Remaining direct reads are identity-only (`ws.name`, `ws.id`, `ws.liveDomain`, `ws.brandLogoUrl`, `ws.siteHasSearch`, `_siteId`) plus analytics maps, matching the allowlist intent behind `schema-context-direct-read-not-on-allowlist`.

items.title: Reset aiLimiter in beforeEach for brandscript-hardening I14 burst-cap
items.notes: Verified during 2026-05-03 flake-hardening pass: no duplicate reset hook needed. brandscript-hardening and brand-identity I14 already isolate aiLimiter by creating a fresh workspace per test, and rateLimit keys include req.path with the workspaceId. Targeted run passed alongside the other flake files.

items.title: Add missing exports to outcome-tracking.js mock factory
items.notes: Fixed during 2026-05-03 flake-hardening pass. Added stable no-op getActionsByWorkspace/getPendingActions/getTopWinsFromActions coverage to outcome-tracking mocks used by workspace-intelligence-related tests so dynamic imports no longer see partial mock shapes. Targeted run passed.

items.title: Investigate content-decay-routes graceful-degradation timeout in full-suite mode
items.notes: Fixed during 2026-05-03 flake-hardening pass. The test server now inherits OPENAI_API_KEY='' so callOpenAI fails synchronously through the missing-key guard instead of retrying a fake provider key. The route still returns 200 with fallback recommendations. Targeted run passed.

items.title: Schema Pillar 2.1 — Stop emitting SearchAction on sites without search
items.notes: Pillar 2's homepage + LocalBusiness templates emitted `potentialAction: SearchAction` unconditionally. Google's docs require the site actually expose a working search endpoint at the urlTemplate; emitting it on a site without search misrepresents capability. Fix: dropped SearchAction emission until a workspace-level signal indicates site search is available. Re-add as opt-in via Workspace.siteHasSearch (or auto-detect from homepage HTML <form action=/search>) is queued under schema-yoast-parity-fields.

items.title: Schema Pillar 1 — Raise the Validator Bar
items.notes: REQUIRED_BY_TYPE in validator.ts now enforces Yoast/Google-baseline completeness. Article/BlogPosting require image+dateModified+articleSection+isPartOf+breadcrumb+inLanguage. WebPage variants require description+isPartOf+breadcrumb+inLanguage. LocalBusiness requires address+telephone+inLanguage. WebSite requires inLanguage (potentialAction is conditional, deferred to schema-yoast-parity-fields where it gates on Workspace.siteHasSearch). Organization requires logo. Cross-ref validators reject malformed isPartOf/breadcrumb shapes and dangling BreadcrumbList @id pointers. NEW value-shape validators reject malformed Article author/publisher/image, non-ISO 8601 dates, non-contiguous breadcrumb positions, and non-absolute URLs on primary nodes. Locks the bar Pillars 2 + 2.1 raised. 24 new test assertions across required-fields, cross-ref shape, and value-shape describe blocks.

items.title: Schema Yoast-Parity Fields PR1 — validator API + 6 fields + slice-migration starter
items.notes: ValidationFinding API (typed { severity, type, field?, ruleId, message }) + 6 new template fields (Service.areaServed, Service.serviceType, LocalBusiness.areaServed, Organization.knowsAbout, Article.keywords, gated WebSite.potentialAction) + Workspace.siteHasSearch field plumbing (default false) + slice-migration starter (siteKeywords + per-page pageKeywords moved to seoContext slice consumption) + new pr-check rule schema-context-direct-read-not-on-allowlist + CLAUDE.md convention paragraph + roadmap migration tracker entry (schema-context-builder-pattern-b-migration). 5 dead SchemaContext._* fields deleted (3 preserved per audit). Frontend renders findings grouped by severity (errors red, warnings amber 'Recommended'). PR2 ships admin discoverability surfaces. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-schema-yoast-parity-fields-design.md. Audit: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-04-29-schema-yoast-parity-fields-audit.md.

items.title: Schema Yoast-Parity Fields PR2 — admin discoverability surfaces
items.notes: Admin discoverability layer atop PR1's typed validationFindings. SchemaCompletenessWidget on the Schema page aggregates findings across all pages with progress bar + missing-field deep-link buttons. BusinessProfileTab gains a 'Schema impact' read-only mirror SectionCard listing 5 schema-impacting fields with ✓/✗ status + deep-links (cross-tab via Link with ?tab=...&focus=..., in-tab via scroll-to-element). FeaturesTab gains Logo URL microcopy + new 'Site capabilities' SectionCard with the siteHasSearch checkbox (toggling on activates PR1's gated WebSite.potentialAction emission). SchemaPageCard now groups findings by field with click-to-expand collapsible rows when a single field has 2+ findings on a page. SchemaSuggester header gains 'X fixes available' annotation. New shared useDeepLinkFocus hook + data-schema-deeplink attribute convention establishes the field-level deep-link two-halves contract. New fieldTargets.ts module is the single source of truth mapping ValidationFinding.field → Settings deep-link. Frontend-only; no backend changes. 8 new component tests (3 hook + 5 widget). Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-29-schema-yoast-parity-fields-pr2.md.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Send to Client Expansion
sprints.rationale: Unified delivery story — every major analysis surface (AEO, Internal Links, Keywords, Redirects, Content Decay, Page Rewriter) gains a client-send action in one sprint.

items.title: AEO Review: Send to Client per-page changes
items.notes:
Add per-page Send to Client button to AEO Review change cards. Each recommended change (rewrite_intro, add_faq, add_section, etc.) should be sendable to the client approval queue with current→suggested diff as the approval payload.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: AeoReview sends page-level client actions with sourceType 'aeo_change', sourceId `aeo:${page.pageUrl}`, client-ready change filtering, and payload.page for client review.

items.title: Internal Links: Send to Client link suggestions
items.notes:
Add Send to Client button per page in Internal Links results. Sends suggested link insertions (anchor text, target URL, context snippet) to client approval queue so client can approve before agency implements.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06 as a filtered-batch client action: InternalLinks has a Send to Client action that packages the currently filtered link suggestions with sourceType 'internal_link' and summary metadata. It is not a literal per-page button, but the client-reviewable link-suggestion workflow is live.

items.title: Keyword Strategy: Send to Client strategy recommendations
items.notes:
Add bulk Send to Client for keyword strategy tabs (Quick Wins, Content Gaps, Low Hanging Fruit). Packages selected recommendations into approval batch for client review before implementation.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: KeywordStrategy has a Send to Client action with sourceType 'keyword_strategy' that packages mapped pages, quick wins, content gaps, opportunities, and low-hanging fruit into the client action queue.

items.title: Redirect Manager: Send to Client redirect proposals
items.notes:
Add Send to Client for proposed redirects (broken links, chain fixes). Client reviews source→target mappings before agency publishes them to Webflow.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: RedirectManager sends accepted redirect proposals to the client action queue with sourceType 'redirect_proposal' and source/target rule payloads.

items.title: Content Decay: Send to Client refresh recommendations
items.notes:
Add Send to Client for decaying content pages. Sends page title, traffic decline data, and recommended action (refresh, merge, redirect) to client for awareness/approval.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: ContentDecay exposes per-page Send to Client on AI refresh recommendation cards and creates sourceType 'content_decay' client actions with the decaying page payload.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Deep Bug Remediation
sprints.rationale: Follow-up queue from docs/superpowers/audits/2026-05-04-deep-bug-audit.md. Focuses on systemic correctness issues found after PR #440: workspace/resource scoping, test isolation, path identity joins, client contract drift, content invalidation, and AI provenance.

items.title: Security scoping PR 1 - Webflow/site ownership guard
items.notes: Added shared requireWorkspaceSiteAccess guard proving workspace -> Webflow site ownership before token lookup or resource mutation. Applied it to Webflow asset/page/publish routes, CMS collection item read/write/publish routes, organize/rename routes, schema site routes, Smart Name, SEO copy, and guarded Webflow job/content-publish surfaces. Threaded workspaceId through scoped admin callers and added cross-workspace JWT integration tests plus owned-site positive-path coverage for schema validation, Smart Name, and SEO copy.

items.title: Test isolation - per-suite DB plus ROI page_keywords read path
items.notes: Added per-worker isolated Vitest DATA_DIR setup before DB singleton import, made spawned integration servers inherit the worker DATA_DIR, shared awaited child-process shutdown across raw-spawn suites, and extended the port uniqueness meta-test to raw server PORT constants. ROI now reads normalized page_keywords rows as source of truth with legacy pageMap fallback, covered by a public ROI integration test that strips legacy pageMap.

items.title: Security scoping PR 2 - Google, reports, global lists, settings, billing, uploads
items.notes: Hardened Google/GSC/GA admin data routes with workspace-site and GSC-property ownership checks, made global Google/settings writes require HMAC admin auth, filtered workspace list and overview responses for scoped JWT users, guarded audit report/snapshot/action routes by owning workspace, required workspace access before uploads, and added authenticated-actor-only billing management for passwordless portals. Added targeted scoped-JWT and passwordless-route regression tests across Google, reports, settings, billing, uploads, and workspace list/overview.

items.title: Page identity joins - normalize remaining page/profile/chat/recommendation lookups
items.notes: Replaced remaining fuzzy/raw page identity joins with exact shared identity helpers across admin chat pageMap lookup, workspace intelligence SEO-context/insights/page-profile joins, audit/CWV/schema/link/SEO edit/content-decay matching, and frontend recommendation filtering. Added frontend/server helper parity tests plus regression coverage for homepage identities, full URLs with query/hash, nested pages, and sibling leaf paths like /seo vs /services/seo.

items.title: Client API contract drift - trials, strategy enrichment, delivery links, priorities
items.notes: Use computeEffectiveTier in all public tier-gated routes, expose content-gap enrichment fields used by the client strategy UI, include deliveryUrl/deliveryNotes for delivered/published public content requests, and align client business priority storage with ClientSignalsSlice reads. Added contract/integration tests for each producer-consumer pair.

items.title: Content data flow - broadcasts, activity, and derived cache invalidation
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-04: added a centralized content:updated workspace event for content-planning/content-pipeline mutations and wired it through the shared WS invalidation bus. Content templates, matrices, content-plan review actions, briefs, post generation/regeneration/revert/delete, and publish-related handlers now refresh admin pipeline/calendar/home/intelligence/ROI plus client content plan/content request caches. Added user-visible activity entries for template/matrix/brief/post lifecycle actions, fixed read-before-delete for brief/post/template/matrix deletes, made client-flagged content-plan cells a real shared status, and added route coverage proving flagged cells stay visible and activity is recorded.

items.title: AI provenance contracts - factual checklist, AEO citations, response parsing
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-04: provenance-sensitive post review checklist items are never auto-checked from AI-only review and are marked human-review required; AEO citation recommendations now require verified source evidence or carry a research-needed flag and are omitted from client handoff until verified; AEO effort values are normalized/validated to exact enum literals; rewrite-chat responses use BEGIN_REWRITE/END_REWRITE delimiters and editor apply/copy paths consume only the rewrite body. Added route, component, and unit coverage for the contracts.
