items.notes: Shipped — Two-pane layout (chat + page content), GPT-4.1 with full workspace context, rewriting playbook in BrandHub, sidebar nav entry, conversation memory

items.title: Page Rewriter UI — sitemap combobox, editable document panel, Apply+Export, focus mode
items.notes: Shipped — Sitemap combobox replaces URL input (GET /api/rewrite-chat/:workspaceId/pages from snapshot). Contenteditable document panel with heading hierarchy and data-section attributes replaces raw text dump. AI rewrite messages show editable suggestion block + Apply button (patches document with teal highlight fade). Floating formatting toolbar (Bold/Italic/H2/H3/Clear) on text selection. Export brief (Copy as Markdown or Download .md). Focus mode toggle collapses sidebar to 14px strip. Backend returns structured PageSection[] instead of flat heading strings. Tests: rewrite-chat-pages.test.ts (port 13316) + rewrite-export-serializer.test.ts (4 unit tests). Feature #138 updated.

items.title: Schema generator: enhanced validation, auto-fix, and improved prompting
items.notes: Shipped — Invalid property detection + auto-strip, cross-reference validation, phone format validation, keyword-stuffing detection, recommended field warnings, 6 new AI prompt rules

items.title: Brand name resolution fix (getBrandName helper)
items.notes: Shipped — Fixes Webflow internal site name injection in AI prompts. New getBrandName(ws) helper across 6 server files.

items.title: Schema accuracy: Google Rich Results validation gate + 9 new page types + health dashboard
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 1: rule-based pre-publish validator (18 schema types, Google field requirements), schema_validations table, publish blocked on errors. Phase 2: 9 new page roles (job-posting, course, event, author, review, pricing, recipe, medical, financial), AI prompt disambiguation rules fixed. Phase 3: SchemaHealthDashboard component with per-page badges and expandable detail, publish gate badge on SchemaPageCard. GPT-4.1 model upgrade. Entity consistency checker.

items.title: LLMs.txt: two-tier output, AI summaries, URL validation, auto-regeneration, freshness tracking
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 4: AI-generated per-page summaries (GPT-4.1-mini, SQLite cache), two-tier output (llms.txt index + llms-full.txt with summaries), URL validation via HEAD requests, removed 50-page CMS cap (now 500), separate download buttons. Phase 5: background auto-regeneration on schema publish / strategy update / content matrix cell published, freshness timestamp tracked per workspace with UI indicator.

items.title: SEO Editor per-page Send to Client + label rename
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page Send to Client button in SEO Editor, bulk button renamed to Send to Client for consistency

items.title: Editable workspace name in Workspace Settings
items.notes: Shipped — Inline-editable workspace name with pencil icon, Enter/Escape support, PATCH /api/workspaces/:id

items.title: Schema Generator: page type selector + auto-load pages on mount
items.notes: Shipped — Pages auto-load on mount with page type dropdowns (13 types). Page type hint passed to AI prompt for tailored schema generation. Initial view replaced with full page list + type selectors + per-page generate buttons.

items.title: Schema Post-Processing Pipeline: Content Verification + AI Auto-Fix Loop
items.notes: Shipped — 7-step postProcessSchema pipeline: autoFix → content verification (strips hallucinated emails/phones/addresses/hours/geo/sameAs) → cross-reference injection → clean → validate → AI auto-fix loop → final output. Also hardened extractStructuredInfo to use visible text only, added anti-fragmentation prompt rules for SaaS sites.

items.title: Unified Site Template: Consistent Organization/WebSite across all pages
items.notes: Shipped — Two-phase schema generation per Google best practices. Homepage saves full Organization + WebSite as site template (SQLite migration 012). Subpages load template and use minimal stubs (@id, name, url only). Missing Org/WebSite/BreadcrumbList nodes auto-injected. Prompt requirements 3-4 updated for homepage/subpage split.

items.title: Schema: Save as Site Template UI + auto-save on homepage publish
items.notes: Shipped — 'Save as Site Template' button on SchemaPageCard for homepage. PUT /api/schema-template/:siteId endpoint. Auto-saves Org + WebSite on homepage publish. getOrSeedSiteTemplate auto-seeds from existing snapshot if no template saved.

items.title: Schema: Logo propagation + edit persistence + FAQ content verification
items.notes: Shipped — Logo carried from template to subpage Organization stubs. updatePageSchemaInSnapshot persists edited schema to SQLite on publish. FAQ content verification strips FAQPage when questions not in page text.

items.title: Schema: Structural FAQ detection + breadcrumb auto-trim + Service url injection
items.notes: Shipped — FAQ verification requires structural evidence (FAQ heading, accordion markup, FAQ CSS classes). Breadcrumb names auto-trimmed (strip brand suffixes, cap ~50 chars). Service/SoftwareApplication url auto-injected from WebPage. SoftwareApplication added to CROSS_REF_RULES and REQUIRED_FIELDS.

items.title: Schema: Organization dedup + Service @id normalization + 37 prompt rules
items.notes: Shipped — Auto-dedup Organization nodes (removes /#organization-stub duplicates). Auto-normalize Service @id to match canonical url field. 37 AI prompt rules: lead-gen page detection (skip Service on /demo, /contact), consistent @id across pages for same product, description length guidance, WebPage desc mirrors meta desc.

items.title: Schema: Site-aware schema plan with page roles, entity registry, and client approval
items.notes: Shipped — AI-driven site-wide schema plan analyzes all pages + keyword strategy to assign page roles (homepage, pillar, audience, lead-gen, blog, etc.) and identify canonical entities with consistent @id references. Plan stored in SQLite (migration 013), injected as context into per-page AI prompts, enforced by post-processing validation. Admin SchemaPlanPanel with role dropdowns and entity registry. Send to Client creates approval batch with plain-English descriptions. 5 API endpoints: generate, get, update, send-to-client, activate.

items.title: Schema: CMS page discovery + unified page type vocabulary + Page Type Guide
items.notes: Shipped — Plan now discovers CMS collection pages from sitemap (up to 500). Unified 16 page types across plan + generator (added service, partnership, comparison, generic; renamed audience). Wildcard expansion for CMS collections. Page Type Guide index with descriptions + URL examples in both SchemaPlanPanel and SchemaSuggester.

items.title: Send to Client for standalone content briefs
items.notes: Shipped — Send to Client button on standalone briefs creates linked content request with client_review status and sends email notification.

items.title: Professional branded blog post PDF export
items.notes: Shipped — Branded print-ready HTML export for blog posts with HMPSN Studio branding, metrics strip, SEO preview, TOC, review checklist, and @page rules. Export PDF button in PostEditor toolbar.

items.title: AI auto-review checklist for blog posts
items.notes: Shipped — AI Pre-Check button in review checklist runs GPT-4.1-mini against post content to evaluate all 6 checklist items. Auto-checks passing items, shows pass/fail badges with AI reasoning.

items.title: CWV field-data vs Lighthouse lab score — dedicated summary card
items.notes: Shipped — CWV data moved out of siteWideIssues into dedicated cwvSummary on audit response. Frontend renders as a prominent card with mobile + desktop columns, per-metric ratings (LCP/INP/CLS), pass/fail badges, and Lighthouse lab score as secondary. Only Lighthouse lab score remains in siteWideIssues as info. Updated CSV/HTML report exports and client portal types.

items.title: Fix AI + SEMRush usage data loss on restart — disk-based queries
items.notes: Shipped — Both openai-helpers.ts and semrush.ts had a MAX_MEMORY_LOG=1000 cap that truncated usage data on startup. Query functions (getTokenUsage, getUsageByDay, getUsageByFeature, getSemrushUsage, getSemrushByDay, getTimeSaved) only read from the truncated in-memory array, so data appeared to vanish after restarts even though disk files were intact. Fix: removed in-memory array entirely, all query functions now read directly from disk JSON files via loadEntriesFromDisk()/loadCreditsFromDisk(). Write buffer (pendingWrites) kept for debounced disk writes only.

items.title: Platform-wide CWV integration — chatbot, monthly reports, InsightsDigest, HealthTab
items.notes: Shipped — CWV data now surfaces across 10 platform surfaces: (1) Client HealthTab card with mobile/desktop pass/fail and plain-language metrics, (2) Client AI chatbot context — cwvSummary added to siteHealthDetail so chatbot answers speed questions, server prompt updated with CWV data inventory line, (3) Monthly report emails — new Page Speed section with Mobile/Desktop speed badges and Lighthouse scores between score ring and traffic stats, (4) InsightsDigest — proactive 'Page speed: Passed/Needs Work' insight card on client Overview tab. Also: admin SeoAudit card, admin AI chat, audit report exports (CSV+HTML), AI recommendations engine, applySuppressionsToAudit pass-through fix.

items.title: Approval batch retract — pull back sent approvals from client view
items.notes: Shipped — New PendingApprovals component shows all pending/partial approval batches with Retract button. Inline confirmation dialog prevents accidental deletes. Expandable item details show per-item approval status. Wired into SeoEditor (nameFilter='SEO'), SchemaSuggester (nameFilter='Schema'), CmsEditor (nameFilter='CMS'). Each tool auto-refreshes the panel after sending new batches. API client method approvals.remove() calls existing DELETE /api/approvals/:workspaceId/:batchId endpoint that had no frontend wiring before. Also added approvals.list() admin endpoint wrapper.

items.title: Audit cleanup: CASCADE migration, stale API modules, recommendation specificity, noindex filtering
items.notes: Shipped — (1) Migration 019: ON DELETE CASCADE for 20+ workspace_id FKs that previously orphaned rows on workspace delete. (2) Fixed stale API module paths: recommendations, keywords.analyze, seoChangeTracker.impact, competitor endpoints now match actual backend routes. (3) Site-wide recommendations (duplicate titles, orphan pages) now list specific affected pages with traffic data instead of 'affects all pages'. affectedPages field added to SeoIssue type. (4) 'Pages needing attention' on HealthTab now filters out noindex pages since their issues don't affect search performance.

items.title: Content gap enrichment: SEMRush volume/KD + GSC impressions on content opportunities
items.notes: Shipped — ContentGap type extended with volume, difficulty, impressions fields. Strategy generation enriches content gaps from SEMRush domain data + bulk getKeywordOverview fallback for volume/KD, and GSC query data for existing site impressions (exact + partial keyword match). UI shows KD (color-coded green/amber/red), volume (searches/mo), and existing impressions on content opportunity cards in both admin ContentGaps.tsx and client StrategyTab.tsx. Public content endpoint passes through new fields. Existing strategies will show metrics after next regeneration.

items.title: AI Keyword Assignment Engine + Competitor-Enriched Strategy
items.notes: Shipped — Overhauled keyword strategy from AI keyword inventor to keyword assigner. Pool built from 5 sources (SEMRush domain, GSC, competitor keywords, keyword gaps, related keywords). AI batch prompt enforces pool assignment. Pre-enrichment skips redundant SEMRush lookups. Lookups capped at 30. Auto-discovery of organic competitors via SEMRush domain_organic_organic. Competitor keywords fetched in quick+full modes. Master prompt requires competitorProof on content gaps. Auto-discover UI button in strategy settings. Saved competitors persist between runs. Orange competitor proof badges in admin + client content gap cards.

items.title: SEMRush Question Keywords + Trend Direction + SERP Feature Targeting
items.notes: Shipped — Three new enrichments: (1) Question keywords via phrase_questions API in full mode, injected into AI context and attached to content gaps. (2) Trend direction computed from 12-month Td field (rising/declining/stable ±15%). (3) SERP features parsed from Fk field, 18 feature types mapped. Content gap cards badged with trend arrows, Featured Snippet/PAA badges in admin and client views.

items.title: Topical Authority Clustering
items.notes: Shipped — v2: AI-powered clustering via callStrategyAI (replaced mechanical 2-word phrase approach). Business context + knowledge base injected so clusters align with actual service areas and content pillars. 5-10 clusters, min 3 keywords each. Coverage bars, avg position, competitor alerts, gap pills.

items.title: Keyword Cannibalization Detection
items.notes: Shipped — v2: Canonical Recommender added. Cross-references keyword map + GSC data. Severity scoring. Now recommends specific action per conflict: canonical_tag, redirect_301, differentiate, or noindex based on page metrics. Includes canonical URL and action-specific guidance. UI shows action type badges with icons.

items.title: Client keyword feedback system (approve/decline)
items.notes: Shipped — Clients approve/decline keywords from Strategy tab. Declined keywords stored in AI memory bank, excluded from future strategy generations. Approve/decline on content gaps + page keyword map. Decline modal with optional reason. Declined Keywords summary section with restore. Migration 020.

items.title: Filter legal pages, 404s, utility pages from strategy
items.notes: Shipped — Expanded SKIP_PATHS, SKIP_PREFIXES, SKIP_PATTERNS in keyword-strategy.ts to exclude /privacy, /terms, /legal, /cookie-policy, /login, /signup, /maintenance, /coming-soon and more.

items.title: Client business priorities input
items.notes: Shipped — Clients add categorized business goals (growth/brand/product/audience/competitive) from Strategy tab. Stored in SQLite, injected into workspace businessContext for AI prompt. Migration 021.

items.title: Content gap voting (upvote/downvote)
items.notes: Shipped — Upvote/downvote arrows on content gap cards. Votes stored per-workspace per-keyword in SQLite. Signals topic priority to agency. Migration 021.

items.title: CMS SEO Editor issue highlighting (match static editor)
items.notes: Shipped — Color-coded left borders (amber for issues, status-based for tracking). 'No title'/'No desc' badges on collapsed rows. Collection-level issue counts. Character count color coding on Name field. Unsaved badge. Matches PageEditRow pattern from static editor.

items.title: SEMRush domain www. fix + credit-exhausted circuit breaker
items.notes: Shipped — cleanDomainForSemrush() strips www. prefix from all 6 domain-based functions. Circuit breaker pauses calls for 5min when credits exhausted. Diagnostic + cache-clear endpoints added.

items.title: Schema retract (plan + individual pages)
items.notes: Shipped — Retract published JSON-LD schemas from individual pages via Webflow Custom Code API. Delete entire schema site plans from SQLite. Confirmation-gated UI in SchemaPlanPanel + SchemaPageCard. Activity log + page state tracking. DELETE /api/webflow/schema-plan/:siteId and DELETE /api/webflow/schema-retract/:siteId/:pageId.

items.title: Client Schema Review Tab
items.notes: Shipped — New 'Schema' tab in client portal showing the schema plan in a client-friendly grouped-by-role view. Replaces 250+ individual approval notifications. Clients approve or request changes at the strategy level. Public endpoints for plan, snapshot, and feedback. SchemaReviewTab.tsx + 3 public API endpoints.

items.title: Type Safety & Lint Cleanup
items.notes: Shipped — Fixed all ESLint errors in ClientDashboard.tsx (10 errors → 0). Replaced ~25 unknown[] types across useClientData.ts, analytics.ts, content.ts, seo.ts with proper typed interfaces. Added 8 new shared type exports. Fixed setPricingData/setAuthMode/setClientUser type mismatches, Date.now() purity violation, Toast type incompatibility.

items.title: React Query Migration — Phase 1: Client Portal (useClientData)
items.notes: Shipped — Created 3 React Query hook files (useClientSearch, useClientGA4, useClientQueries) + barrel index in src/hooks/client/. Rewrote useClientData.ts as backward-compatible facade composing 15 useQuery hooks. Replaced loadDashboardData with dataEnabled gate, refetchClient with queryClient.invalidateQueries, loadSearchData/loadGA4Data with query-key-driven refetch. Simplified audit:complete WS handler. Fixed loadApprovals prop types in ApprovalsTab + InboxTab. 130 component tests pass, tsc + vite build clean.

items.title: React Query Migration — Phase 2: Analytics (GoogleAnalytics + SearchConsole)
items.notes: Shipped — Created useAdminGA4 (11 queries) and useAdminSearch (6 queries) in src/hooks/admin/. Rewrote GoogleAnalytics.tsx: removed 14 useState + useCallback + useEffect, replaced with useAdminGA4 hook. Rewrote SearchConsole.tsx: removed 9 useState + useEffect + loadData, replaced with useAdminSearch hook. Removed 3 duplicate local interfaces (use shared types). Fixed GA4PeriodComparison type bug. 130 tests pass, tsc + vite build clean.

items.title: React Query Migration — Phase 3: Content Pipeline
items.notes: Shipped — Created useAdminBriefs.ts (2 hooks), useAdminPosts.ts (4 hooks: list, single, versions, publish-target). Migrated ContentBriefs.tsx (removed 4 data useState + useEffect data-loading + fetchPosts, all mutations use queryClient.setQueryData/invalidateQueries, onRequestCountChange derived via useEffect). Migrated ContentManager.tsx (removed 3 useState + useEffect + polling, replaced with useAdminPostsList + usePublishTarget). Migrated PostEditor.tsx (removed 4 useState + useEffect + polling, replaced with useAdminPost + useAdminPostVersions + usePublishTarget, refetchInterval for generating status).

items.title: React Query Migration — Phase 4: SEO Tools + Admin Dashboards
items.notes: Shipped — Migrated WorkspaceHome (12 useState→1 useQuery), WorkspaceOverview (6→1), SeoAudit (3 useEffect→3 useQuery), SchemaSuggester (2→2), AssetBrowser (2→2). Created 4 hook files: useWorkspaceHome, useWorkspaceOverview, useAdminSeo (5 hooks), useAdminAssets (2 hooks). All mutations use queryClient.setQueryData for optimistic updates. Completes React Query migration across entire frontend.

items.title: Schema strategy isolation — removed from client Inbox
items.notes: Shipped — Schema strategy no longer creates approval batch items. send-to-client endpoint updates plan status and sends email without approval items. Strategy review lives in dedicated Schema tab only. Individual per-page schema approvals still use approval system.

items.title: SearchTab redesign — insight-first, tables secondary
items.notes: Shipped — AI-style natural language takeaway at top, insight cards promoted to hero section (full-width for 1, 2-col for 2+), raw queries/pages tables collapsed by default behind chevron toggle. Visual flow: takeaway → metrics → insights → trend → rank tracking → annotations → collapsible tables.

items.title: Test coverage — admin hooks + layout components (37 tests)
items.notes: Shipped — useWorkspaces (6), useHealthCheck (3), useQueue (3), Sidebar (12), Breadcrumbs (13). All 37 pass. First hook tests in codebase using renderHook + QueryClientProvider.

items.title: Email throttle & anti-spam system — per-category rate limits + morning digest
items.notes: Shipped — status emails: 1/day morning digest at 9am ET. Audit emails: max 1/14 days. Action emails: max 3/day. Alert emails: max 1/day. Global cap: 5 non-transactional/day per client. Transactional (password reset, welcome, trial) never throttled. SQLite email_sends table with 30-day auto-cleanup. Integrated into batching queue, approval reminders, manual remind endpoint (429 if throttled), monthly reports.

items.title: Client strategy UI refinements — voting simplification, growth sort, GSC fix, keyword tracking auto-seed + client add
items.notes: Shipped — (1) Content Opportunities: removed duplicative up/down arrows, kept Relevant/Not relevant buttons. (2) Growth Opportunities: 'Almost there' items sorted to top. (3) Page Performance Map: fixed 'No GSC data' bug — gscKeywords + previousPosition were stripped from public endpoint. (4) Keyword Tracking: auto-seed from strategy keywords on generation + client-facing add/remove UI with new public endpoints. (5) Client keywords → content pipeline: tracked keywords injected into strategy keyword pool with source:'client', AI batch prompt highlights them for priority page assignment, master prompt ensures content gaps are generated for uncovered client keywords.

items.title: Claude for all SEO rewrites + persistent bulk suggestions with 3 variations
items.notes: Shipped — All SEO rewrite endpoints (single, bulk-fix, bulk-rewrite) now use callCreativeAI() (Claude primary, GPT fallback). Bulk rewrite generates 3 differentiated variations per page, stored in SQLite seo_suggestions table (migration 023). Suggestions persist across refreshes. SeoSuggestionsPanel component lets user select preferred variation per page, then apply to Webflow in batch. API: GET/PATCH/POST/DELETE /api/webflow/seo-suggestions/:wsId.

items.title: Unified AI Context Architecture — buildSeoContext() as single source of truth
items.notes: Shipped — Expanded buildSeoContext() to return personasBlock, knowledgeBlock, and fullContext convenience string. Eliminated all separate buildPersonasContext/buildKnowledgeBase imports across 13 call sites. Wired 5 previously-missing features: seo-audit auto-fix, GSC chat, keyword analysis, content decay, content post AI review. Feature #162.

items.title: React Query Migration - Complete Simple Components
items.notes: Shipped — Migrated AnomalyAlerts, ContentPipeline, and SeoEditor from manual useEffect to React Query. Fixed type mismatches, replaced fetchPages() calls with queryClient.invalidateQueries(), removed 40% of data fetching boilerplate. All simple patterns now standardized. Complex components (ContentCalendar, CmsEditor) remain for future work.

items.title: Persisted Page Analysis → AI Rewrite Integration
items.notes: Shipped — Page Analysis (optimizationIssues, recommendations, contentGaps) now persisted to keywordStrategy.pageMap. New persist endpoint, buildPageAnalysisContext() helper, wired into single + bulk rewrite prompts. SEO Editor 'Analyze Page' button runs keyword analysis + auto-persists. Green indicator when analysis exists. Feature #163.

items.title: Unified Title + Description Generation ('Generate Both')
items.notes:
Shipped — field='both' mode for single + bulk SEO rewrite. AI generates 3 paired title/description sets per page. Frontend: 'AI Generate Both' button, paired variation picker, bulk 'AI Rewrite Both'. Feature #164.
[2026-05-01 PR #400] Bug fix: aiRewrite never sent field="both" — added aiRewriteBoth() with paired variation picker UI. Also fixed: always send both title+description context to AI (bug 3).

items.title: Bulk Page Analysis + CMS Collection Pages
items.notes: Shipped — 'Analyze All Pages' button in both SEO Editor and Page Analysis page. Sequential bulk analysis with progress + cancel. Auto-persist to keywordStrategy.pageMap. New /api/webflow/all-pages/:siteId endpoint discovers CMS pages from sitemap. CMS badge in page list. Feature #165.

items.title: Page Analysis Context Wired into AI Features
items.notes: Shipped — buildPageAnalysisContext() now injected into rewrite chat, content decay refresh recommendations, and SEO audit auto-fix prompts. 3 more AI features now address platform-flagged page issues. Feature #166.

items.title: Page Intelligence — Unified Per-Page SEO Tab
items.notes: Shipped — Merged Page Keyword Map and Page Analysis into single 'Page Intelligence' sidebar tab. New PageIntelligence.tsx component (790 lines). Strategy tab cleaned to strategy-only (removed per-page detail, PageKeywordMapPanel, Analysis sub-tab). Command Palette updated. Feature #167.

items.title: Page Intelligence — Full Analysis Persistence + Hydration
items.notes: Shipped — All 15 KeywordData fields now persisted to strategy.pageMap (was 7). Hydration effect restores full analysis reports from persisted data on component load. Extended buildPageAnalysisContext() with optimization score, keyword presence gaps, competitor keywords, topic cluster, and difficulty.

items.title: Page Intelligence Data Wired into Schema Generator, Content Briefs, Internal Links
items.notes: Shipped — Schema generator now receives topicCluster, contentGaps, optimizationScore per page via _pageAnalysis context. Content brief generator matches target keyword to pageMap and injects buildPageAnalysisContext(). Internal links now shows topic cluster annotations per page and groups cluster summaries for intra-cluster linking priority.

items.title: Page Intelligence — Fix These First Priority Queue
items.notes: Shipped — Auto-prioritized fix queue at top of Page Intelligence. Ranks pages by impact = impressions × (100 - optimizationScore) / 100. Shows top 5 pages with score badges and impact numbers. Click to expand page detail.

items.title: Page Analysis — CMS Title/Meta Extraction + Live Domain Fetch
items.notes: Shipped — page-html endpoint now tries live domain first (CMS pages 404 on webflow.io). Extracts <title> and meta description from HTML and returns them. Frontend uses HTML-extracted values for CMS pages lacking Webflow API seo data. Feature #170.

items.title: Page Analysis — Background Job System
items.notes: Shipped — Bulk 'Analyze All Pages' moved from frontend loop to server-side job system. Job type page-analysis: discovers pages, fetches HTML, extracts meta, calls GPT-4.1-mini, persists all 15 fields. Batches of 3, cancellable, WebSocket progress. Feature #171.

items.title: SEO Editor — Full Collection Item Pagination
items.notes: Shipped — Webflow API caps at 100 items/request. cms-seo endpoint now paginates through ALL items with do/while loop. Sitemap discovery tries live domain first. CMS URL cap raised to 500. Feature #172.

items.title: Stale Chunk Auto-Reload (lazyWithRetry)
items.notes: Shipped — After deploys, Vite chunk hashes change but cached HTML references old filenames → 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' errors. New lazyWithRetry() utility wraps React.lazy() with try/catch + single auto-reload via sessionStorage flag. Applied to all ~43 lazy imports across App.tsx, SeoAudit.tsx, ContentPipeline.tsx, ClientDashboard.tsx. Feature #173.

items.title: Fix fuzzy path matching bug across all pageMap lookups
items.notes:
Shipped — includes()-based path matching caused every page to match '/' (homepage) since all paths contain '/'. Broke page analysis persistence (only 7/256 pages saved) AND all AI features received homepage keywords instead of page-specific ones. Fixed 5 instances in 4 server files + frontend path display for nested pages. Feature #174.
[2026-05-01 PR #400] Bug fix: 4 remaining fuzzy-match instances across webflow-seo.ts (GSC + audit matching), seo-change-tracker.ts (matchPage), admin-chat-context.ts (page audit lookup). All now use normalizePath() + exact comparison.

items.title: Shared path utilities + clear-on-reanalyze
items.notes: Shipped — Extracted 4 shared path utilities (normalizePath, matchPagePath, findPageMapEntry, resolvePagePath) into server/helpers.ts + mirrored frontend src/lib/pathUtils.ts. Replaced 7 pageMap.find() call sites and 16 publishedPath||slug patterns across the codebase. Prevents future path matching bugs like #174. Also: 'Re-analyze All' now clears stale analysis fields from all pageMap entries before starting (preserves keyword assignments). Feature #175.

items.title: Normalize pageMap into dedicated page_keywords SQLite table
items.notes: Shipped — Extracted keywordStrategy.pageMap from workspace JSON blob into indexed page_keywords table. O(1) per-page reads/writes instead of full blob deserialization. 13 reader/writer call sites updated. Migration function runs idempotently on startup. Feature #176.

items.title: Process: generate feature-specific guardrails before implementation begins
items.notes: Already added to CLAUDE.md Session Protocol rule 5. For any multi-phase or cross-system feature, generate: (a) CLAUDE.md rules for reusable patterns, (b) .windsurf/rules/<feature>.md reference doc, (c) per-phase acceptance checklists in the plan. First applied on Connected Intelligence Engine Phases 2-3. This is a process rule, not a task — marking as done.

items.title: Process: pre-implementation guardrail generation for multi-phase features
items.notes: Before starting any multi-phase or cross-system feature: (1) analyze spec for error-prone patterns, (2) write CLAUDE.md rules for reusable patterns, (3) create .windsurf/rules/<feature>.md for feature-specific contracts, (4) embed per-phase acceptance checklists in the implementation plan. Rule added to CLAUDE.md Session Protocol step 5. Reference: typed-contracts PR where schema-vs-stored-shape, field-name-mismatch, and || undefined bugs were all caught in review rather than prevented upfront.

items.title: Page analysis race condition + performance fixes
items.notes: Shipped — Three fixes: (1) Race condition: concurrent updateWorkspace calls inside Promise.all caused read-modify-write data loss. Fixed by collecting batch results then persisting atomically. (2) getSiteSubdomain called per-page (~256 redundant Webflow API calls) — moved outside loop. (3) Added 10s timeout to HTML fetches to prevent job hangs.

items.title: Approval review cycle audit — P0-P3 fixes
items.notes: Shipped — Full audit of approval/review cycle. P0: save-edit no longer clobbers item status (Object.assign undefined fix). P1: retract works for approved/rejected batches, two-step rejection with notes, edit diff UI, bulk approve confirm, React Query migration. P2: client undo (approved/rejected → pending) with PageEditState sync and activity logging; rejection notes cleared on undo. P3: all 4 public approval endpoints secured with requireClientPortalAuth() middleware. Also: batch 'rejected' status with recalculation + badge, live WebSocket updates for admin PendingApprovals, Zod validation on endpoints.

items.title: Analytics Intelligence Layer — Phase 1A/1C/1D (Sonnet tasks)
items.notes: Shipped — Foundation for analytics intelligence. (1A) analytics_insights SQLite table (migration 035) with UNIQUE(workspace, page, type) + 7 insight types; analytics-insights-store.ts CRUD module; AnalyticsInsight types + 7 data shapes in shared/types/analytics.ts. (1C) server/api-cache.ts — 15-min in-memory TTL cache for GSC/GA4 responses with createApiCache factory, wrap/get/set/invalidate API. (1D) GET /api/public/insights/:workspaceId endpoint + InsightCards component (3 cards: Traffic Momentum, Quick Wins, Top Performers) with tier-aware CTAs; useClientInsights hook; queryKeys.client.insights. All TDD: 28 new tests across 4 test files. Phase 1B (intelligence computation engine) deferred to Opus.

items.title: Analytics Intelligence Layer — Phase 1B (Opus: computation engine)
items.notes: Shipped — server/analytics-intelligence.ts with lazy evaluation (6h TTL). 4 pure computation functions: (1) page health scores (0–100, 4-component scoring: position/traffic/CTR/engagement), (2) quick wins (positions 4–20, ≥50 impressions, traffic gain estimates via expected CTR curves), (3) content decay (current vs previous 30d GSC clicks, >20% decline flagged, severity tiers), (4) cannibalization (multi-page ranking for same top-20 query). Orchestrator fetches GSC+GA4 in parallel via apiCache.wrap(), persists via upsertInsight(). Public endpoint upgraded to getOrComputeInsights() with lazy evaluation. 25 new unit tests, all TDD.

items.title: Analytics Intelligence Layer — Phase 2 (AI Engine Enrichment)
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 2A: Schema pipeline enrichment — added _pageHealthScore, _pageHealthTrend, _quickWinStatus, _faqOpportunities to SchemaContext; buildSchemaIntelligenceBlock() + extractFaqOpportunities() in schema-suggester.ts; buildSchemaContext() in helpers.ts extended with queryPageData + insightsMap from intelligence layer; all 3 callers updated. Phase 2B: Content brief enrichment — buildBriefIntelligenceBlock() injects cannibalization warnings, decay context, quick wins, page health into generateBrief() prompt. Phase 2C: Chat advisor — added 'insights' context category with pattern matching; buildInsightsContext() formats health scores, quick wins, decay, cannibalization for chat prompt. 36 new TDD tests across 3 files.

items.title: Analytics Intelligence Layer — Phase 3 (Advanced Intelligence)
items.notes: Shipped — 3 advanced algorithms: (1) Keyword clustering via Union-Find with word Jaccard similarity + page co-occurrence, pillar page detection. (2) Competitor gap analysis via SeoDataProvider abstraction (SEMRush + DataForSEO), auto-discovery, volume/difficulty scoring. (3) Conversion attribution from GA4 organic landing pages with conversion rate computation. All wired into computeAndPersistInsights() orchestrator + buildInsightsContext() chat advisor. 20 new TDD tests.

items.title: Analytics Intelligence Layer — Phase 4 (Strategy Engine + Client Polish)
items.notes: Shipped — 5 sub-tasks: (1) Strategy enrichment — buildStrategyIntelligenceBlock() injects keyword clusters, competitor gaps, performance deltas, conversion data into master prompt. (2) 2 new insight cards — Schema Opportunities + Content Health with tier-gating. (3) Analytics annotations — SQLite table + CRUD + admin/public routes (4 categories). (4) Content calendar intelligence — suggestPublishDates() from decay + quick wins. (5) GSC pagination — paginateGscQuery() helper, getQueryPageData upgraded to 2000 rows. 35 new TDD tests.

items.title: Outcome Intelligence Engine
items.notes: Full implementation: action tracking (10+ source systems), outcome measurement at 7/30/60/90d checkpoints (GSC + GA4 delta), win/loss/neutral scoring, workspace learnings with confidence thresholds (high 25+, medium 10-24, low <10), AI prompt injection, admin Outcomes Dashboard (4-tab: Overview/Actions/Wins/Learnings), client tiered reporting (Free top-3-wins, Growth scorecard, Premium detailed), We Called It external detection (2-cycle confirmation), multi-workspace overview with aggregate stats, action playbooks (pattern detection from multi-action pages), backfill engine (idempotent retroactive action creation from generated_posts/analytics_insights/recommendation_sets), cron scheduler for measurement and external detection. Feature flags: outcome-tracking, outcome-ai-injection, outcome-dashboard, outcome-client-reporting, outcome-external-detection, outcome-playbooks.

items.title: Unified Workspace Intelligence Layer Phase 3A
items.notes: Shipped — 5 PRs (#116-#120). Shared types + bridge scaffolding. All 8 slice assemblers + compositeHealthScore + read-time bridges #8/#9/#14 + scheduler/churn/anomaly cache invalidation + WS INTELLIGENCE_CACHE_UPDATED handler. as-any elimination (38 casts → import type, surfaced 9 hidden data bugs). formatForPrompt expansion (5 new slice formatters, verbosity levels), tokenBudget §20 priority chain, pr-check regression guards (listPages, buildSeoContext, recordAction), 120+ new tests. Deferred to Phase 3B: mini-builder retirement (25 buildSeoContext callers + 6 buildPageAnalysisContext callers), businessProfile enrichment (needs structured editor UI), contentGaps bridge.

items.title: Unified Workspace Intelligence Layer — Phase 3B (Mini-Builder Retirement + Advanced Slices)
items.notes: Shipped — PR #125. Retired buildSeoContext (all callers migrated to buildWorkspaceIntelligence). Structured businessProfile editor + wire into SeoContextSlice. contentGaps bridge from strategy to PageProfileSlice. N+1 pre-assembly in seo-audit.ts and webflow-seo.ts (hoist workspace slices before per-page loops). Fixed strategyHistory SQL (wrong column names silently broke stmts() cache). Removed as-any cast on seoDataProvider. Format fidelity: 7 previously-assembled fields now rendered in prompt formatters. pr-check guards upgraded from warn → error (buildSeoContext + listPages). 25+ new contract tests.

items.title: Unified Workspace Intelligence Layer — Phase 4A (Infrastructure: Data Retention + Cache Warming)
items.notes: Shipped — PR #128. Data retention crons (daily): chat_sessions 180d, audit_snapshots 365d (time-based, preserves full trend history), llms_txt_cache 90d. Intelligence cache warming cron every 6h for workspaces with activity in last 30 days (7 slices, excludes pageProfile). isRunning guard prevents overlapping cycles. Startup timeouts tracked at module level for clean cancellation. 10 tests.

items.title: Unified Workspace Intelligence Layer — Phase 4B (Admin Chat Migration + businessProfile Auto-Populate)
items.notes: Shipped — PR #129. Admin chat context now sources activity/performance/client health from intelligence slices (operational, siteHealth, clientSignals) instead of direct DB helpers. Context size managed through selective slice inclusion per question category (not tokenBudget — admin-chat-context never calls formatForPrompt). getLinkCheck/getPageSpeed supplemental direct calls preserved for per-URL dead link detail and worst-page scores (siteHealth slice stores counts only — same pattern as listBatches() for approvals). CWV pass rate decimal fix (0-1 → %). ChurnSignalSummary title+description fields surfaced. businessProfile auto-populate: Sparkles button in IntelligenceProfileTab calls POST autofill endpoint, uses seoContext slice (not businessProfile — avoids chicken-and-egg), GPT-4.1-mini (temp 0.3, 300 tokens) returns industry/goals/targetAudience. 16 tests (8 structural + 8 behavioural classifyQuestion).

items.title: Unified Workspace Intelligence Layer — Phase 4C (Client Intelligence API + Portal Widget)
items.notes: Shipped — PR #130. ClientIntelligence shared type (5 interfaces — scrubbed, tier-gated view; no knowledgeBase/brandVoice/churnRisk/operational/strategy_alignment). GET /api/public/intelligence/:workspaceId: free gets insightsSummary+pipelineStatus, growth adds learningHighlights, premium adds siteHealthSummary. useClientIntelligence hook (5-min stale, React Query). IntelligenceSummaryCard in client OverviewTab: high-priority insights + briefs in progress (blue, all tiers), win rate (teal, Growth+ TierGate). 13 tests across 4 test files.

items.title: Auto-resolve audit_finding insights when issues are fixed
items.notes: Shipped — PR 3 Platform Health Sprint. Added bridge-audit-auto-resolve trigger after on-demand audit completion. Resolves page-level findings when page no longer has issues, and site-level findings when score >= 70. Integration test at tests/integration/audit-insight-resolution.test.ts.

items.title: Bridge #12: refresh audit_finding data on subsequent audit runs
items.notes: Shipped — PR 3 Platform Health Sprint. Added bridge-audit-page-health trigger after on-demand audit completion. Creates new audit_finding insights for pages with critical/warning issues. Updated 2026-04-20 (insight-hardening): removed dedup-skip block from scheduled-audits.ts — upsertInsight() ON CONFLICT clause already preserves resolution_status, so skipping re-upsert was causing stale audit data to persist. Pages now get refreshed data on every re-audit regardless of existing insight status.

items.title: Anomaly boost score reversal/decay when anomalies are dismissed
items.notes: Shipped — PR 3 Platform Health Sprint. reverseAnomalyBoostIfNoneRemain() called after dismissAnomaly(). When no recent undismissed anomalies remain, removes 'anomaly' score adjustment key via applyScoreAdjustment(data, score, 'anomaly', 0). Integration test at tests/integration/anomaly-boost-reversal.test.ts.

items.title: Strategy Card Context — AI-Aware Per-Page SEO Metadata
items.notes: Shipped — PR #137. strategyCardContext block added to keyword strategy generation: each page in pageMap carries cardContext.pageType, pageTypeLabel, strategicPriority, priorityReason from getPageTypeConfig(). Injected into content brief prompts via buildStrategyCardBlock(). Exports getPageTypeConfig() for downstream consumption. Feature #206.

items.title: Backlink Profile in Admin AI Intelligence Context
items.notes: Shipped — PR #137. backlinkProfile field added to SeoContextSlice; opt-in via enrichWithBacklinks flag in IntelligenceOptions. Admin chat sets flag to give AI advisor real backlink data (total backlinks, referring domains). Cache key includes :bl suffix to prevent bleed between enriched/non-enriched entries. Provider respects workspace.seoDataProvider preference via getBacklinksProvider() with capability-disabled fallback. Cron does NOT pre-warm this key (different slice combinations prevent cache hit). Feature #207.

items.title: SERP Features Pipeline — Capture, Store, Aggregate, Brief Directives
items.notes: Shipped — PR #137. Four-stage pipeline: (1) Capture: hasSerpOpportunity() parses SEMRush Fk codes during strategy generation → writes serp_features TEXT column (migration 051) per page. Exact matches always write (even []) to prevent COALESCE stale-data bug. (2) Aggregate: assembleSeoContext() computes workspace-level SerpFeatures (featuredSnippets, peopleAlsoAsk, localPack count). (3) Prompt: formatSeoContextSection() renders SERP features at standard/verbose verbosity. (4) Brief directives: generateBrief() injects per-feature structural directives into prompt (40-60w direct answer for featured snippet, 4-6 Q&A FAQ for PAA, video embed for video, NAP+LocalBusiness for local pack). Feature #208.

items.title: Strategy cards: handle below-threshold volume gracefully
items.source: Session 2026-04-06 — visual inconsistency on local/niche keywords
items.notes: Shipped — PR 3 Platform Health Sprint. Added VOLUME_THRESHOLD=10 filter in KeywordStrategy.tsx. Pages with known volume < 10 are filtered from the rendering path. Pages without volume data (not yet enriched) pass through to avoid silently hiding unvalidated entries. Also fixed pre-existing inline queryKey strings → queryKeys.admin.keywordStrategy() factory calls.

items.title: Hybrid SEO provider: DataForSEO primary with SEMRush capability fallback
items.notes: Shipped. getProviderForCapability(capability, preferred?) added to seo-data-provider.ts. getBacklinksProvider() now delegates to it. DataForSEO proactive init probe (Task 6) marks backlinks disabled before the first user request.

items.title: Cross-Provider Keyword & Backlink Hardening (A3/A4 fixes)
items.notes: Shipped — PR #218. (1) serpFeatures carry: competitorKeywordData now includes optional serpFeatures field to preserve SERP feature data from both DFS and SEMRush (previously silently dropped). (2) Provider date normalization: normalizeProviderDate() helper converts raw Unix epoch timestamps and string dates from SEMRush and DataForSEO to ISO-8601 format at provider boundary — prevents 'Invalid Date' in referring-domain dates. (3) Competitor keyword limits: Full-mode fetch raised 100 → 200; SEMRush overfetches 2× + sorts by volume to match DFS ordering. (4) Regression guards: Two pr-check rules guard against provider date/serpFeatures loss. Feature #300.

items.title: Webflow Nested Page Path Hardening Sprint
items.notes: All 8 bugs fixed (BUG-0001 through BUG-0008). resolvePagePath adopted at 15+ sites. applyBulkKeywordGuards moved to helpers. GSC path-boundary matching. bare-slug-pagepath pr-check rule added.

items.title: SEO Tier 3 Data Source Enrichment
items.notes: Six discrete backend enrichments across SEO pipelines: (Item 12) GSC queries as keyword candidates in keyword-recommendations.ts; (Item 13) GSC query breakdown in content-decay refresh AI prompt; (Item 13b) Decay query context injected when brief matches decaying page; (Item 13c) DecayContext.topQueries from GSC in copy-refresh AI prompt; (Item 14) SEMRush metrics pre-fetch for top-N pages in jobs.ts bulk analyze; (Item 15) Issue-type-specific recovery rates replacing flat 12% in recommendations.ts. All six independent, no API/UI changes, no new DB columns or shared types.

items.title: Schema Generator One-Shot Quality Hardening
items.notes: 7 targeted fixes to schema output quality and intelligence wiring. (1) UTILITY_SLUGS constant — single regex applied at hasPart/relatedLink injections and generation queue pre-filter. (2) SiteNavigationElement block deleted from postProcessSchema; removed from PAGE_TYPE_SCHEMA_MAP homepage secondary array. (3) CollectionPage injection guarded with pagePath !== '/'. (4) upgradeHealthcareType() deterministic fallback: businessContext → Dentist/Physician/Optician/Chiropractor/MedicalClinic/Hospital/MedicalBusiness. (5) autoFixSchema: knowsAbout trimmed ≤5, Product zero-price offers stripped, SiteNavigationElement nodes stripped. (6) INVALID_PROPERTIES expanded with Product: ['pricing', 'features', 'cost']. (7) Prompt: healthcare rule promoted to 3b with expanded trigger keywords; Product zero-price guard added as 9b; SiteNavigationElement removed from homepage instructions. (8) Intelligence context: _serpFeatures + _backlinkReferringDomains from workspace intelligence layer (non-blocking); _existingErrors from schema_validations at all 3 call sites. (9) Declined keywords filtered before context assembly. (10) BusinessProfileTab amber warning for empty profile on local-business workspace. Audit: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-04-28-schema-generator-audit.md.

items.title: Lean Schema Generation Rewrite
items.notes: Replaces 2,558-line schema-suggester.ts pipeline with deterministic 6-module package at server/schema/. URL classifier + per-type templates + canonical data sources + 2 surgical AI extractors (description, FAQ) + per-type validator + thin orchestrator. Output ~72% smaller, validates first time, eliminates duplicate WebPage bug and wrong-type bug for case studies/privacy/index pages. Common types only (BlogPosting, Article, Service, Product, LocalBusiness, AboutPage, ContactPage, CollectionPage, WebPage, Organization, WebSite). Healthcare uses LocalBusiness fallback; subtype escalation deferred to schema-intelligence-layer-v2.

items.title: Schema Pillar 2 — Data Wiring & Cross-References
items.notes: Brand-suffix scrubber strips ' | Brand'/' - Brand'/' — Brand'/' · Brand' from name fields and breadcrumb leaves. Every non-homepage primary node emits isPartOf (→#website), breadcrumb (→#breadcrumb), inLanguage (Yoast-baseline @graph topology). Article emits articleSection (URL-derived) and Person author when CMS fieldData exposes one. New discoverCmsItemsBySlug joins sitemap URLs against /collections/:id/items so CMS pages get real datePublished + author from fieldData. Homepage Organization gains sameAs+foundedDate from BusinessProfile; WebSite gains potentialAction (sitelinks SearchAction). Default locale extracted from Webflow site.locales.primary.tag via extended listSites and SchemaContext._defaultLocale. Locks via 4 integration assertions. Closes wiring gaps from 2026-04-29 audits. Pillar 1 (validator bar) and Pillar 3 (compile + CI gates) ship next.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Broadcast Invalidation Audit (do next)
sprints.rationale: Recurring UX symptom: components show stale/empty data on first mount and 'fix themselves' on hard refresh. Root cause pattern — long staleTime React Query hooks without a useWorkspaceEvents broadcast subscription (violates Data Flow Rule #2). PageIntelligence is the confirmed instance; likely a platform-wide class of bug.

items.title: Fix PageIntelligence missing broadcast invalidation
items.source: User report 2026-04-21 — 'page intelligence doesn't display data at first, but then on refresh it does'
items.notes: Shipped 2026-04-21 alongside Devin-flag fixes for PR #249. Added useWorkspaceEvents subscription to src/components/PageIntelligence.tsx that invalidates queryKeys.admin.keywordStrategy on STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts. Resolves staleTime 10min cache-miss UX where users saw empty data until hard refresh. #597 (platform-wide audit) still pending.

items.title: Platform-wide audit: useQuery hooks with staleTime but no broadcast subscription
items.notes: Shipped 2026-04-21. Centralized 7 workspace-scoped events in src/hooks/useWsInvalidation.ts (STRATEGY_UPDATED, BRANDSCRIPT_UPDATED, DISCOVERY_UPDATED, VOICE_PROFILE_UPDATED, BRAND_IDENTITY_UPDATED, BLUEPRINT_UPDATED, BLUEPRINT_GENERATED — total centralized now 43). Removed redundant inline useWorkspaceEvents subscriptions from 10 component files (PageIntelligence, SeoEditor, KeywordStrategy, VoiceTab, IdentityTab, BrandscriptTab, DiscoveryTab, PageStrategyTab, BlueprintDetail, BlueprintVersionHistory). Added two-layer regression guardrail: pr-check rule (self-syncing allowlist parsed from useWsInvalidation.ts, escape hatch `// ws-invalidation-ok`) catches reintroduced inline handlers; contract test (tests/contract/ws-invalidation-coverage.test.ts) catches new WS_EVENTS entries added without either centralization or an explicit LOCAL_ONLY_EVENTS rationale. items.title: AI insight validation pass (quality gate on surfaced insights)
items.notes: Shipped — deterministic rules-based validation pass (validateInsightBatch) inserted into computeAndPersistInsights pipeline after all insight types computed, before feedback loops. Three rule categories: (1) contradiction suppression — ranking_opportunity+content_decay and ctr_opportunity+content_decay on same page suppress weaker signal, (2) severity clash — positive+critical on same page suppresses positive, (3) low-confidence suppression — ranking_opportunity <100 impressions or <5 traffic gain, content_decay <10 absolute click loss, ctr_opportunity <5 click gap. Added suppressInsights batch-delete helper to analytics-insights-store. 11 unit tests covering all rule categories + no-op scenarios.

items.title: Assembler catch hardening — distinguish programming errors from expected degradation

Also applied to content-decay.ts, keyword-recommendations.ts, routes/misc.ts. Compile-time import type contracts added for HIGH-risk modules. Backlog #14/#15/#16/#17 resolved in same pass. pr-check rule added.

items.title: Broad server catch hardening — extend isProgrammingError to 344 silent catches outside workspace-intelligence.ts

Added createLogger imports to 23 files that previously had no logger. Expanded pr-check rule from workspace-intelligence.ts-only to all server/ files. sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — SEMRush API Cost Optimization
sprints.goal: Reduce SEMRush credit consumption by 40-60% without degrading strategy quality

items.title: Extend SEMRush cache TTLs by data volatility
items.notes: Shipped — Named TTL constants: keyword metrics 7d→30d, related/questions 7d→30d, domain overview 48h→7d, backlinks 48h→7d, competitors 72h→14d. Domain organic stays at 7d (rankings shift weekly). ~10-20% fewer cache misses on repeat operations.

items.title: Unify domain organic fetch limit to prevent cache misses
items.notes: Shipped — Strategy gen fetched limit=100 (quick) or limit=200 (full), but getKeywordGap internally re-fetches client domain with limit=200. Different limit = different cache key = duplicate API call. Standardized to 200 for all modes.

items.title: Global cross-workspace keyword metrics cache (SQLite)
items.notes: Shipped — keyword_metrics_cache SQLite table with L1/L2 cache chain in getKeywordOverview: L1 (global SQLite) → L2 (per-workspace file) → L3 (SEMRush API). File cache hits backfill global table. API results write to both caches. Saves 30-50% of keyword_overview credits across workspaces in same industry. Feature #178.

items.title: Pre-enrichment deduplication in strategy generation
items.notes: Shipped — Post-AI validation now checks domain organic data (already fetched earlier in the same run) before calling SEMRush API. Combined with #375 (page_keywords skip). Saves ~1,000 credits per strategy run. Feature #178.

items.title: Skip keywords with existing metrics in page_keywords table
items.notes: Shipped — Post-AI validation checks existing page_keywords entries (from previous runs) before calling SEMRush API. On re-runs, 60-90% of validation API calls eliminated since most keywords are unchanged. Combined with global cache (#373) and domain organic dedup (#374). Feature #178.

items.title: Incremental strategy updates (re-analyze changed pages only)
items.notes: Implemented: mode='incremental' param on POST /api/webflow/keyword-strategy/:id. Uses analysis_generated_at (7-day threshold) to split pages into toAnalyze vs toPreserve. Only runs AI batching on stale/new pages; existing keyword rows for fresh pages are left untouched via upsertPageKeywordsBatch instead of upsertAndCleanPageKeywords. Added 'Update changed pages' button in KeywordStrategy.tsx. New competitorLastFetchedAt field on Workspace (migration 052). 8 integration tests pass.

sprints.name: 🗃️ TERMINAL HISTORY — SEO Decision Engine — close the data→decision gap (8-phase program)
sprints.hours: TBD — phased, one PR per phase, staging-first
sprints.rationale: Terminal item history split from sprint-seo-decision-engine-2026-06-23. From the 2026-06-23 15-agent SEO audit (overall C, 'A-grade architecture wired to a C-grade decision surface'). Group A flips loops already built; Group B fixes geo correctness + adds a cost-governed foundation; Group C adds paid capabilities. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-23-seo-decision-engine-design.md. Deferred items (status: deferred) are out-of-program backlog captured so nothing is lost.

items.title: Local Presence Phase 1 — dedicated admin IA shell under Strategy
items.notes: Completed 2026-06-29: added `/ws/:workspaceId/local-seo` as the admin Local Presence page under the visible Strategy nav group while keeping the internal group key `seo-strategy`. Re-homed workspace-level local posture, markets, local visibility workflow, and aggregate GBP review readouts into Overview/Visibility/Reviews/Setup tabs. Keyword Hub now shows a compact Local Presence handoff while preserving keyword-level local filters, annotations, row data, and drawer evidence. No OAuth/token storage, raw review sync, reply publishing, new provider calls, tables, migrations, jobs, or Google scopes were added; authenticated GBP remains Phase 2+.

items.title: Direct Google Business Profile integration (OAuth) — owner-authenticated read + write actions
items.notes: PROGRAM parent for authenticated Google Business Profile work. Follow-on to P7 (seo-engine-p7-gbp-reviews-local-layer), which benchmarks PUBLIC GBP data via DataForSEO business_listings_search (rating, review count, public completeness signals — no auth, read-only, advisory recs). Split into one PR per phase: 2A connection + mapping, 2B authenticated reviews read model, 2C review response approval + publish. Distinct from intel-quality-google-business-profile-health (read-only PUBLIC health signals). Until GBP API access is approved, P7's public benchmarking stands as the read-only product. || [ROADMAP VALUE AUDIT 2026-07-12] DONE: program parent completed through Phase 2A OAuth/mapping, Phase 2B authenticated review sync/read model, and Phase 2C draft-to-approval-to-Google reply publishing. External rollout validation remains flag lifecycle work.

items.title: GBP Phase 2A — encrypted OAuth connection, account/location discovery, workspace mapping
items.notes: Completed 2026-06-29: added `gbp-auth-connection` (default OFF) separate from `local-gbp`; encrypted Google OAuth token storage using dedicated integration encryption; signed single-use OAuth state; Google Business Profile account/location discovery; normalized connection/account/location/workspace mapping tables; admin routes under `/api/google-business-profile/*`; Workspace Settings connection UI; Business Footprint location mapping UI; and Local Presence Setup/Reviews connection/mapping status. Explicitly no raw review sync/storage, review text, response generation, reply publishing, background jobs, or Google review scopes in this phase. Also fixed post-merge staging CI checkout permissions by granting `contents: read` to checkout jobs.

items.title: GBP Phase 2B — authenticated reviews sync + per-location read model
items.notes: Completed 2026-06-29: added `gbp-auth-reviews` (default OFF) dependent on `gbp-auth-connection`; normalized authenticated GBP review storage and sync status tables; bounded per-location review sync from Google `accounts.locations.reviews.list`; Local Presence Reviews authenticated triage with aggregate/per-location rating, count, newest-review, unanswered, low-rating, freshness, and recent excerpt summaries; workspace broadcasts/query invalidation for review sync changes; and explicit copy-policy guardrails (`aiUseAllowed: false`) so raw authenticated review text is admin-triage-only. No response drafting, client approval loop, Google reply publishing, sentiment extraction, AI/copy reuse of raw review text, or background review sync job in this phase.

items.title: GBP Phase 2C — review response drafting, approval, and Google reply publishing
items.notes: Completed 2026-06-29: added `gbp-review-responses` (default OFF) dependent on `gbp-auth-connection` and `gbp-auth-reviews`; normalized review response workflow/event/publish-attempt tables; an explicit draft/client-awaiting/approval/publishing/published/failure state machine; AI operation `gbp-review-response-draft` with JSON validation and public-reply constraints; Google `accounts.locations.reviews.updateReply` publishing via background job `gbp-review-reply-publish`; admin Local Presence Reviews triage; client Inbox review-response approval cards; deliverable type `gbp_review_response`; and workspace broadcasts/query invalidation. Existing replied reviews remain read-only. No auto-publish, scheduled auto-responder, bulk generation, or general AI/copy reuse of raw review text was added.

items.title: DEFERRED — Historical/seasonality endpoints: google_trends, dfs_trends, historical_keyword_data, bulk_traffic_estimation for forecasting
items.notes: Provider-grounded traffic/seasonality forecasting beyond the heuristic value bands. Lower leverage than the program; revisit after Group C. || [ROADMAP VALUE AUDIT 2026-07-12] RESCOPE-MERGE into ov-seasonality-monthly-volumes, the canonical deferred series/forecasting owner.

sprints.name: 🗃️ TERMINAL HISTORY — MCP Surface Upgrade — close the stateless loops + agent instruction quality
sprints.hours: TBD — phased, P0 first, one PR per coherent batch, staging-first
sprints.rationale: Terminal item history split from sprint-mcp-surface-upgrade-2026-06-26. From the 2026-06-26 MCP surface audit (45 tools; Q1 agent-instructions D, Q2 coverage C+, Q3 scale C). Two end-to-end agent loops are stateless and can't reach a terminal state: content→published and analytics→resolved. Agent guidance is near-absent (no server instructions string, zero .describe()) and the server is single-instance-only (in-memory handle store, no /mcp rate limit, one shared key). The brand-slice effort already closed the Outcomes/Brand coverage row (get_brand_identity read + update_brand_deliverable write + voice/identity to agents); the rest of the audit's prioritized roadmap is captured here. Audit: docs/audits/2026-06-26-mcp-surface-audit.md. Each P0–P1 tool wraps a verified, workspace-scoped existing service fn and must follow MCP write discipline (route through service fn, addActivity source:'mcp-chat', broadcastToWorkspace).

items.title: P0 — add server-level instructions string (single highest-impact agent-guidance fix)
items.notes: Done (split from the .describe() pass into its own PR). New server/mcp/instructions.ts exports MCP_SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS, wired into server.ts new Server() options ({capabilities, instructions}). Workflow+gotcha orientation: workspace-id-first (+ workspace_id/workspaceId casing split), the prepare_*→save_*→send_to_client handle pipeline (single-use, ~15-min TTL, workspace+kind-scoped), optimistic-concurrency editing (expected_revision/expectedVersion), the paid-tool + destructive-tool lists. Every concrete claim verified against schemas/handlers. Tests: tests/unit/mcp-instructions.test.ts (content contract) + a wiring assertion in mcp-server-routing.test.ts (Server constructed with instructions). Uses STUDIO_NAME constant (pr-check).

items.title: P0 — add .describe() to every property in mcp-action-schemas.ts
items.notes: Done (top-level scope, owner decision). Added 121 .describe() calls in shared/types/mcp-action-schemas.ts (was 0): 7 shared building blocks (workspaceIdSchema, revisionSchema, pageTypeSchema, contentRequestStatusSchema, postStatusSchema, insightTypeSchema, handleIdSchema — propagate to every consuming tool) + 114 top-level properties across all ~40 *InputSchema. Propagates to tool-discovery JSON Schema via zod-to-json-schema (no handler changes). Audit high-value params described well: slices (lists all valid slice names incl brand + optional/default), addKeywordToStrategy.target (discriminated union variants), sendToClient four targets (surfaces the exactly-one .refine rule), update_brief/post mode (patch vs replace + field requirements), expected_revision (optimistic-concurrency token), [Paid API] on research_keywords/start_* params. NESTED content/layout/outline inner fields deliberately NOT described (agents build those from prepare_*_context). ENFORCING contract test added in tests/contract/mcp-tool-input-schema-properties.test.ts: every top-level tool-input property must have a non-empty description (names any missing). Behavior-neutral (.describe() is metadata-only). circular-deps unaffected. COMPLETES the MCP P0 batch (PRs #1403/#1404/#1406/#1407 + this).

items.title: P0 — resolve_insight (+ bulk): closes the stateless analytics loop
items.notes: Done. Added resolve_insight + bulk_resolve_insights MCP tools in server/mcp/tools/insights.ts (auto-routed via insightTools.some → no server.ts change). Each calls resolveInsight(...,'mcp-chat') + addActivity(source:mcp-chat) + broadcast(INSIGHT_RESOLVED), and on resolved calls the NEW shared helper recordInsightResolutionOutcome (extracted verbatim from server/routes/insights.ts into server/outcome-tracking.ts so agent + operator resolutions feed outcome-learning identically; route refactored to use it — behavior-preserving, verified by audit-insight-resolution + insights-queue-diagnostics-lifecycle integration tests). Schemas resolveInsightInputSchema/bulkResolveInsightsInputSchema. Real-DB test tests/unit/mcp-insights-resolve.test.ts (resolve/in_progress/not-found/cross-workspace/bulk/invalid). circular-deps 0/0. Closes the stateless analytics loop.

items.title: P0 — inbox decision tools (update approval item / respond to client action)
items.notes: Done. Two MCP tools in server/mcp/tools/clients.ts (alongside get_pending_work; auto-routed via clientTools.some): (1) respond_to_client_action — routes through the admin service updateAdminClientAction (transition guard + activity + broadcast + insight/outcome feedback loop); status approved/changes_requested/completed/archived/pending. (2) respond_to_approval_item — DECLINE-ONLY by owner decision: routes through respondToApprovalBatchItem with status hardcoded to rejected (request changes) + actor {name:MCP agent} (honest attribution, not Client). An agent CANNOT approve approval items on the client behalf (approval is the client review decision + sends approved team emails). Schemas respondToClientActionInputSchema/respondToApprovalItemInputSchema (no status field on the approval one). Routes through domain services that already broadcast (mcp-action-must-broadcast mutationFnRe does not match them — no double broadcast). Test tests/unit/mcp-inbox-tools.test.ts (10) incl. the decline-only + honest-actor contract. circular-deps 0/0. Closes the read-only inbox loop (client-action half fully; approval half decline-only).

items.title: P0 — rate-limit /mcp + real paid-call budget covering the two paid jobs
items.notes: Done. (1) Rate-limit /mcp: new mcpLimiter=rateLimit(60s,120) [per-path, NOT global — global would share globalPublicLimiter's  bucket and cross-contaminate /mcp with /api/public/] in server/middleware.ts, applied via a top-level req.path===/mcp check (mirrors publicWriteLimiter) so the bucket key is  (/mcp was unthrottled — the 3 public limiters only cover /api/public/). 120 req/min/IP — generous for a normal agent workflow, bounds a runaway loop / leaked-key abuser; 429 + Retry-After on exceed. (2) Paid-call counting parity: start_keyword_strategy_generation + start_local_seo_refresh now call recordPaidCall(1) and surface the warning (previously only research_keywords counted); both tool descriptions tagged [Paid API]. Tests: mcp-rate-limit.test.ts (120 allowed / 429 after) + extended mcp-tools-job-actions.test.ts (paid jobs count, seo_audit does not). DEFERRED: hard paid-call ENFORCEMENT (circuit breaker that refuses calls over a budget) is intentionally NOT here — the counter is a per-instance module-global let, so real per-workspace durable budgets belong with the P1 durable-handle-store item (mcp-durable-handle-store). The rate limiter is the request-level circuit breaker; this completes the informational paid-call signal.

items.title: P1 — publish_post + advance_content_status (close the content loop)
items.notes: Done (closes the content loop — the third stateless loop after analytics + inbox). Two tools in server/mcp/tools/content-actions.ts (auto-routed via the if-name dispatch): (1) advance_content_status(workspace_id, request_id, status, internal_note?) routes through updateContentRequest (validates the transition) + addActivity(content_updated, source mcp-chat) + broadcast(CONTENT_REQUEST_UPDATE). status RESTRICTED to in_progress | delivered (operator-workflow only) — client_review/post_review email the client (go through send_to_client), approved/changes_requested are the client's portal decisions, published is publish_post, declined is a separate dismissal. (2) publish_post(workspace_id, post_id, generate_image?) wraps publishPostToWebflow (the shared service that owns the field map + broadcast CONTENT_PUBLISHED + activity + outcome) — APPROVED-ONLY by owner decision: refuses unless post.status==='approved' (an agent can never push an un-reviewed draft to the client's LIVE site, even though the service itself permits draft/review admin-override). Extended PublishPostToWebflowOptions.activitySource union with 'mcp-chat' for attribution (behaves like 'manual'). Schemas advanceContentStatusInputSchema/publishPostInputSchema (with .describe() per the P0 contract test). Tests extended in tests/unit/mcp-tools-content.test.ts incl. the approved-only refusal across draft/review/generating/error. circular-deps 0/0. Adversarial review pending.

items.title: P1 — durable shared handle store + paid counter (TTL sweeper, MAX_HANDLES) — unblocks multi-instance
items.notes: DONE (PR #1410). handles.ts + paid-call-counter.ts now persist to SQLite (migration 162: mcp_handles + mcp_paid_call_counts). API kept synchronous (better-sqlite3) so zero callers changed. TTL sweeper (gated off under tests, .unref()'d), MAX_HANDLES eviction by rowid (deterministic under same-ms ties), single-use consume. Paid counter durable + INFORMATIONAL only (no hard cap — owner decision); global aggregate under '__global__' preserves prior threshold semantics, optional workspaceId adds per-workspace attribution. Follow-up mcp-per-workspace-paid-attribution: thread workspaceId through the keyword-actions/job-actions call sites.

items.title: P1 — grounded content jobs + schema tools (gen/validate/publish) + recommendations (gen/read/lifecycle)
items.notes: DONE (PR #1412). 3 new tool categories: schema-actions (generate_schema/validate_schema/publish_schema — validate-first guard refuses invalid schema), recommendation-actions (list_recommendations + apply_recommendation send/throttle/strike via the recommendation-lifecycle single-writer API), content-generation-actions (start_brief_generation/start_post_generation — [Paid API] grounded jobs delegated to the background job platform). Follow-up mcp-schema-publish-to-live-service: publish_schema omits the admin route's best-effort post-publish follow-ons (outcome tracking, recordSeoChange, llms.txt regen, rec-regen) and imports a publish helper from the route module — extract a publishSchemaToLive domain service used by both.

items.title: P1 — per-key workspace scoping + caller identity + multi-key rotation
items.notes: DONE (PR #1411). Additive per-workspace MCP API keys on top of the RETAINED env MCP_API_KEY master key. mcp_api_keys table (migration 163): sha256-hashed (plaintext shown once), revocable (rotation). mcpAuthMiddleware: master → scope 'all' (unchanged, timing-safe compare preserved); else hash-lookup → workspace scope + caller label. SECURITY-CRITICAL workspace-scope enforcement in handleMcpRequest checks BOTH workspaceId/workspace_id casings; no-workspace_id tools rejected for scoped keys; fail-closed. Follow-up mcp-admin-key-minting-ui: admin route/UI to mint/list/revoke keys + thread req.mcpAuth.label into per-tool activity attribution.

items.title: Follow-up — extract publishSchemaToLive domain service (MCP schema-publish parity + remove tool→route import)
items.notes: publish_schema (server/mcp/tools/schema-actions.ts) does the core live write + rollback/page-state/intelligence updates, but OMITS the admin route's best-effort post-publish follow-ons (outcome tracking, recordSeoChange, llms.txt regen, rec-regen) and imports publishSchemaToCmsField from server/routes/webflow-schema.ts (tool→route import smell). Extract a publishSchemaToLive domain service in server/domains/schema/ used by both the admin route and the MCP tool — same pattern as onContentRequestLive.

items.title: Follow-up — admin UI/route to mint/list/revoke per-workspace MCP API keys
items.notes: DONE. Admin Settings surface (Settings → MCP API Keys, src/components/McpApiKeysSettings.tsx) + global admin route (server/routes/mcp-api-keys.ts, requireAdminAuth/HMAC-only — JWT client users fully excluded, so no workspace-access guard needed; documented inline hatch): GET list-all (metadata only, workspace-name enriched, masterKeyConfigured flag), POST mint (workspace picker + label → plaintext revealed ONCE via copy-to-clipboard callout), DELETE revoke (ConfirmDialog → 200, 409 if already revoked, 404 unknown). Added listMcpApiKeys(workspaceId?) to server/mcp/api-keys.ts (never leaks key_hash/plaintext). New shared/types/mcp-api-keys.ts, src/api/mcpApiKeys.ts, src/hooks/admin/useMcpApiKeys.ts, queryKeys.admin.mcpApiKeys(). 2 admin-only ActivityTypes (mcp_key_created/mcp_key_revoked, deliberately NOT in CLIENT_VISIBLE_TYPES). Tests: integration mcp-api-keys-admin (create→list-no-secret→/mcp auth works→revoke→/mcp 401→404/409 paths) + component McpApiKeysSettings (loaded/empty/create-reveal, real hooks). Four Laws compliant (teal actions, emerald active badge, no purple). The caller-label attribution half is split to mcp-key-label-attribution.

items.title: Follow-up — thread req.mcpAuth.label into MCP write-tool addActivity calls (per-key attribution)
items.notes: CLOSED 2026-07-13 — superseded by mcp-generation-runtime-foundation; no shipment is claimed by this closure. The confirmed attribution gap remains in scope under that canonical P0 foundation item, which owns authenticated MCP key ID/label propagation into write activity and durable generation-run attribution before new generation tools ship.

items.title: Follow-up — thread workspaceId through recordPaidCall call sites for per-workspace paid attribution
items.notes: PR #1410 made the paid-call counter durable + per-workspace-capable (recordPaidCall(increment, workspaceId?)), but the keyword-actions/job-actions/content-generation-actions call sites still call recordPaidCall(1) without a workspaceId, so only the global '__global__' aggregate is populated. Pass the workspaceId (in scope at each call site) to populate per-workspace rows.

items.title: P2 — raw GSC/GA4 read tool with date-range/period-comparison params
items.notes: Zero days/dateRange/startDate on any read schema today → caps diagnosis quality. Wrap getSearchOverview/getPerformanceTrend/getSearchPeriodComparison (search-console.ts) so the agent can compute its own trends.

items.title: P2 — widen save_brief/update_brief schema to persist the full ContentBrief
items.notes: buildBriefEntity (content-actions.ts:658-684) maps only 12 of ~35 ContentBrief fields and briefPatchContentSchema is .strict() so updates REJECT the rich fields → silent loss of ~20 fields. Widen the schema + mapper.

items.title: P2 — bound get_anomalies + paginate cross-workspace sweeps + unify error shape + observability + idempotency keys
items.notes: get_anomalies returns JSON.stringify with no .slice()/limit (insights.ts:89-102) unlike its capped siblings; get_pending_work + list_workspaces do unbounded N+1 sweeps. Plus: unify the MCP {isError,content} envelope vs router {error} 500 (index.ts:13-16); add request-level structured logging/metrics/tracing at the MCP boundary (only log.debug({tool}) today); idempotency keys on create_* (create_workspace/create_content_request duplicate on retry).

items.title: P2 — server/mcp/README.md (handle pipeline, revision protocol, paid-tool list, casing split)
items.notes: No README in server/mcp/ today; CLAUDE.md mentions MCP only architecturally. Document the prepare_*→save_* handle pipeline (single-use, 15-min TTL, workspace/kind-scoped), the get_*→expected_revision protocol, the paid-tool list, and the workspace_id vs workspaceId casing split.

items.title: Voice-sample dedup on deliverable edit/re-approval (provenance-aware)
items.notes: setDeliverableStatus auto-creates a voice_sample (source 'identity_approved', 500-char snapshot, no link back to the deliverable) when a tagline/elevator_pitch/tone_examples deliverable is approved. Editing (now cheap via update_brand_deliverable) resets to draft; re-approving creates a FRESH sample rather than updating the prior one → stale/near-dup samples can accumulate and dilute voice calibration. DECISION 2026-06-29: LEAVE AS-IS — the sample/deliverable decoupling is deliberate (samples are independently curatable; revert-to-draft intentionally doesn't delete the sample), frequency is low, impact mild, and a proper fix fights that design. REVISIT TRIGGER: agent-driven edits churn these 3 types frequently and the VoiceTab fills with near-dup samples. Then: add source_deliverable_id to voice_samples + non-destructive 'update-if-unedited' logic (don't clobber curator edits). Cheap interim option: idempotency guard skipping an auto-sample when an identical-content 'identity_approved' sample already exists. Owner may remove. || [ROADMAP VALUE AUDIT 2026-07-12] OBSOLETE-CLOSE with no implementation. Independent sample curation and low observed churn outweigh provenance-linked dedup complexity. Reopen only with evidence of near-duplicate sample accumulation.
